The pipe bomb truth MAGA spent years trying to bury

# [A Tale of Two Bombs And A Thousand MAGA Lies](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=181374626&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgxMzc0NjI2LCJpYXQiOjE3NjU2NzU1NTUsImV4cCI6MTc2ODI2NzU1NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.0zapxsRqwsO1eMt7cnbujsZ78E2BdHz2pFwgQR85g-s)
### The pipe bomb truth MAGA spent years trying to bury
| | [David Shuster](https://substack.com/@davidshuster) and [Blue Amp](https://substack.com/@blueamp)
---
| Dec 14
---
| [](https://substack.com/@davidshuster)| | [](https://substack.com/@blueamp)
---|---|---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=181374626&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgxMzc0NjI2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2NTY3NTU1NSwiZXhwIjoxNzY4MjY3NTU1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzcyMjUzMiIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.qmLADNSjBDBWvKWxQQn8RJOsJiLLo3dcmXrSjgSkwkQ&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=181374626&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgxMzc0NjI2LCJpYXQiOjE3NjU2NzU1NTUsImV4cCI6MTc2ODI2NzU1NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.0zapxsRqwsO1eMt7cnbujsZ78E2BdHz2pFwgQR85g-s&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=181374626&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgxMzc0NjI2LCJpYXQiOjE3NjU2NzU1NTUsImV4cCI6MTc2ODI2NzU1NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.0zapxsRqwsO1eMt7cnbujsZ78E2BdHz2pFwgQR85g-s)

---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1267d5eb-c81d-4d06-9ea1-a0f8ca856504?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/18cbb915-9d31-4b0a-bbd8-1a6273a847b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_**By David Shuster**_
By now, all Americans should be used to modern political con artists - men and women who traffic in outrage, conspiracy, and the sacred currency of fear. But even by the most debauched standards of the Trump era, the spectacle surrounding the pipe bombs outside the Democratic and Republican Committee headquarters on January 5, 2021 has revealed that the state of our political discourse is even more obscene than we could have imagined.
After nearly five years of wild speculation, the Federal Bureau of Investigation recently identified and charged Brian J. Cole Jr., a 30-year old Virginia man, with placing the devices--which fortunately never detonated--near what should have been otherwise secure national political party offices.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/18cbb915-9d31-4b0a-bbd8-1a6273a847b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In interviews with federal law enforcement agents, Cole said he believed the 2020 election was stolen. It's the very lie that drove millions of MAGA to fever dream about a rigged result and triggered the January 6th attempted capitol insurrection.
Cole is no deep state phantom. He is not an "anti-Trump insider" or operative dispatched to sabotage the MAGA movement.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=181374626&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgxMzc0NjI2LCJpYXQiOjE3NjU2NzU1NTUsImV4cCI6MTc2ODI2NzU1NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.0zapxsRqwsO1eMt7cnbujsZ78E2BdHz2pFwgQR85g-s)
And yet for years, countless voices across the right wing media ecosystem howled the opposite: the pipe bombs were a "cover up," an "inside job," an elaborate ploy by nebulous forces to pin blame on conservative patriots. One of the most vocal purveyors and amplifiers of this crap was Dan Bongino.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/18cbb915-9d31-4b0a-bbd8-1a6273a847b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
For years, he was a right wing podcaster and Fox News contributor who thundered that the federal government knew the pipe bomb truth but withheld it. Bongino repeatedly called it a "massive coverup."
Now, Bongino is the Deputy Director of the FBI. It's a fact that would be astonishing [had we not, in the last decade, grown so numb to the absurdities and hypocrisies of right-wing politics](https://substack.com/redirect/730e0fee-b1c0-4f97-af3b-afabd2bdecee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). When pressed recently on Fox News by Sean Hannity about his past assertions, Bongino conceded, "I was paid in the past for my opinions. That's clear. And one day I'll be back in that space. But that's not what I'm paid for now."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/71b8b0bb-c4b9-49f5-afb5-509bc79d1f9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Think about that for a second. A man paid to fabricate and amplify conspiracies now stands in a position of immense power. He claims that now, because of an FBI title, he "bases investigations on facts." It is the political equivalent of sending a Fox to guard the chicken coop and trusting the Fox will use Fox (News?) repellent.
* * *
Join Blue Amp Media now!
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.3yeJTORLiJdW6LnAtySP77piSMCvtLtBUWE4k0Uof8A?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=181374626)
* * *
Through the years political scientists have repeatedly found that every complex problem in a society invariably gets reduced by quacks to the simple feelings of hate and fear. If the identity of a would-be bomber can be dismissed as "the Democrats' evil plot," then Trump Republicans don't need to examine the river of misinformation that carries MAGA lunatics to that point.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b57a4b12-ff2a-423b-8633-b8a1b61c77e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
If an entire right-wing audience can be fed the fiction that law enforcement itself masterminded an act of terror - when all evidence showed this was a lone actor motivated by the very conspiratorial rhetoric churned out by right-wing media, then nothing matters anymore but the shallow performance.
[Even more revealing has been the media's reaction to the real story.](https://substack.com/redirect/71b8b0bb-c4b9-49f5-afb5-509bc79d1f9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) If the suspect had been anything other than a believer in "Stop the Steal," every cable news outlet, every Sunday talk show, and every social media feed would have exploded in breathless coverage. Instead, the news has flicked past like an unremarkable blip.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/18cbb915-9d31-4b0a-bbd8-1a6273a847b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The truth is not worthy of sustained attention because it doesn't confirm the trope the Trump crowd demanded.
The suspect was not a shadowy deep-state Democratic operative. He was not a saboteur planted inside MAGA. He was a man [radicalized by the very Trumpian lies that too many people in the public sphere have trafficked with glee](https://substack.com/redirect/b57a4b12-ff2a-423b-8633-b8a1b61c77e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and no accountability.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.3yeJTORLiJdW6LnAtySP77piSMCvtLtBUWE4k0Uof8A?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=181374626)
So let this be yet another cautionary footnote in our ongoing national story: When we allow demagogues to twist reality for profit or power -- when we shrug and accept that "everyone does it" -- we undermine the very foundation of a sane and just society.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/18cbb915-9d31-4b0a-bbd8-1a6273a847b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The pipe bombs of January 5th were real. The suspect now charged is real. The conspiracy theories that enveloped the case for years were self-inflicted MAGA fiction and right wing delusions.
The rest of us would be wise to remember that _facts_ , not fantasies, are the bedrock of justice. And people who trade in falsehoods, like Dan Bongino, should not be treated as prophets but as what they are: peddlers of peril.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/18cbb915-9d31-4b0a-bbd8-1a6273a847b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dan Bongino should not be in the FBI. He should be under investigation and kept far away from any position that involves public trust.
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bf6243d6-35d8-413f-acf4-26c699478c61?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.3yeJTORLiJdW6LnAtySP77piSMCvtLtBUWE4k0Uof8A?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)

name: NDRC
subject: NEW: The “crown jewel” of the Republican redistricting crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
It’s the “crown jewel” in Republican attempts to gerrymander, and it must be stopped.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121227879/588796177/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdmODM4YjM2LTg4ZDgtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZLE6fgEQY9nuuGJVUSYXCHHdW233xEVDjfu5snXD7TA=&emci=1819aa16-99d7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=7f838b36-88d8-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=8431045)
---

| **_“Florida becomes the GOP’s biggest redistricting test — and a messy one” — Politico_**
---
Peter,
Florida Republicans had a hearing earlier this week about their forced mid-decade map redraw — one that could potentially tip the scales in their favor by _three to five additional congressional seats_.
Some are calling this the “crown jewel” of the recent Republican campaign to gerrymander before the midterms. And what happens could ultimately determine which party controls Congress next year.
**[We’re rapidly mobilizing to fight back against any attempt to gerrymander Florida’s map, but we can’t let up in combating the redistricting crisis everywhere else. body:
Will you answer his call, Peter?
#
**Former President Obama has a message for Democratic donors:**
_"What’s being asked of us is make some effort to stand up for the things that you think are right. And be willing to be a little bit uncomfortable in defense of your values. And in defense of the country. And in defense of the world that you want to leave to your children and your grandchildren."_

**If we’re going to elect Democrats and defend our country from the extreme MAGA agenda in 2026, we have a lot of work ahead of us.**
Every threat to our country + freedoms by the GOP must be met with immediate action from engaged citizens like YOU, Peter.
**That action could look like making a donation, which is what we’re asking you to do today.** But it could also mean calling your elected leaders, volunteering for a candidate or an organization you care about, or even just staying involved in your community and keeping in touch with your neighbors.
**We’re not powerless in this fight. We must meet this moment with the urgency it demands, in any way we can.[So please, if you’re able to today, chip in $5 or more to support our work to elect Democrats across the country »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98572?refcode=em20251213-9829&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9829%2E614464%2ETU0h76)**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
[](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/DcDOuwTff0JF5i3-O0fQtq4enCvRv28OhgPGM5LyaQlvaZpJ4-tRiZi2nhM2NLgY6k-Db74S_Xdt_wwUiFGW4Pl9WkKMa2ZHPV5-hjsO0Mm5kvs0bHT-8OlRLChgt2BPJgpw2feDUYGY2dFHnovS1zK7UM9ZSplmC29rc7Zw81dHPLRvvH9UWuHCKMaBcTSdfEc3sw8EJo0UXEHvYu-_jT7TKBV4QSWjs1XGlkC5q9OjxH8irPPhZAOMHC3Lw8gSRC1nfp2F3fj4ulqTdbubySqIHdFzv0eQug4FFaB5vMWJarNa1JCBO013ARrVtTkNSvVFZVU1lKbhmS2_ZN0vUEY1oGXHGz1laVqF_685zWeuFiP_9QiNukaFI78N3YRKRz8H7LlQ8x_HcoZhQ3Ur4bhKHCGutNn9kt_UsUl561AlHfcBe1-58TA88rcL-IdsZUrssfnsta4lZbP2gPw-NQDNRCD7XA0HBG7xN1KAehZc1NoNOH5gU8jCX7XVCzT_EcfalAaRcoaG9dZh7MPsNoHomyGWb_dPdYbCNYdDN_K0cyYgWLK_SVxNwcjfnvXfvwrVyeql2tF9yElgCgufg47HsNSvzjO2vfgXE0CfDXbGViUsdiz153M_bfmpmHSGmlzU8PNdjKB7FwoOdtRZd-_GwXS0okwr6nV9RTaOlQBpuiKFScOdxI0-XGuABZUnkaOOFu9WRHhjfpZJp2cAWPf3T8fMX4ubFeG40MVLR4ruK2SFQKBbDccu-ubs1xQj_IfZSRQtw4fiBb9Av1zshvUZD9II_BIYgDnJ0qdlU6lSaRUDjUhK__AQg1Awe-beULXauLo/GNMWyoaHIU1YS-PlKGngQgWmj4iOyeTu/15)The way these Democrats are acting up right now's got me madder than a wet hen in a tote sack.
This ain't the same Party that it was when I first entered the big leagues. It's become a paradise for Liberal hogwash and downright anti-American behavior.
Whether it's...

* Rioting in cities across America and burning Old Glory
* Storming ICE facilities, doxxing agents, and throwing sandwiches at law enforcement
* Having actual COMMUNISTS run some of our greatest cities

It sure seems like once you think the Democrats can't stoop any lower, they grab a shovel and prove you wrong... Guess they never heard the first rule of holes: if you're in one, STOP DIGGING.
_But let me tell you the God-honest truth. They have the money to do it and if we don 't get our act together, they just might put us in their place._
Right now, the Democrats have a well-oiled fundraising machine that is raking in the big bucks from its out-of-touch, elitist donors - 100 million bucks, to be exact.
After seeing that, I knew I had to step in.
**_[So my good friend Majority Leader Steve Scalise and I got to talking. clean_body: way these Democrats are acting up right now's got me madder than a wet hen in a tote sack. This ain't the same Party that it was when I first entered the big leagues. It's become a paradise for Liberal hogwash and downright anti-American behavior. Whether it's... Rioting in cities across America and burning Old Glory Storming ICE facilities, doxxing agents, and throwing sandwiches at law enforcement Having actual COMMUNISTS run some of our greatest cities It sure seems like once you think the Democrats can't stoop any lower, they grab a shovel and prove you wrong... Guess they never heard the first rule of holes: if you're in one, STOP DIGGING. But let me tell you the God-honest truth. They have the money to do it and if we don 't get our act together, they just might put us in their place. Right now, the Democrats have a well-oiled fundraising machine that is raking in the big bucks from its out-of-touch, elitist donors - 100 million bucks, to be exact. After seeing that, I knew I had to step in. Do you reckon you could be one of those Conservatives? we all step up and work together I think we'll be able to keep these Democrats at bay and continue to deliver wins for good, hard workin' Americans. But I can 't do it without you, Peter. Thanks for hearing me out, John N. Kennedy A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise: I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY for that specific reason. subject: We won’t ask again

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: My recovery after the car crash
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.

Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zve0a9rd9ojkm70s1olond4bjtu0ut1amldfouf0_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti60o35chh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
---
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.**
---
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfrcmr38ai2sn02m2fh0qdacq1s8l95j2pg922sg_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti60o35chh2bs)
__
---
One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – _the highest civilian honor in America._**
---
**President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
---
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more...**
---
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.
---
__Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__
---
[**So, if you can, please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk9shbh2kh0phi77u6kchbe84ugt0imq62cekrm0_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti60o35chh2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2o6s49m1nmuslop81ouatii6uijmu103gbpcjdg_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti60o35chh2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziksr77avkfnf826i4fa1e1ftutomb81ni6ubj0g_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti60o35chh2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh6q9sbplp9lhit36nnl138qkc7pm6ootlfdci88_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti60o35chh2bs)
---

---

[CONTRIBUTE $500](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlsu7orei43en92a6s1qil7ih57n2fbcvldb1tco_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti60o35chh2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhkf766a73aakn89oq2de21pa8hhtlbj4asn59b0_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti60o35chh2bs)

Thank you and God bless you,

name: AMAC Action
subject: American elections should be decided by American citizens
body:
It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.

| |
---
| | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.
---
| |
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z66s5jkle28t3o9ou6392p4l240k8sqntkjoag7g_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti60p74cth2bs)
---
| | **“****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfifajhj8hesidhe5cidt5p6hfjqb12pfg0v1ip8_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti60p74cth2bs)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. **[It’s vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvdk5or0tfrminbtr9ag3dbh1fe237fdeobih638_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti60p74cth2bs)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.****And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zor1qemje1b97601lbikf9sfnbql83a1ai6bkcl0_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti60p74cth2bs)**[And AMAC Action needs your help today in this do-or-die battle to pass a Constitutional Amendment to protect your vote from being canceled out by an illegal alien or a convicted felon.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zeg93hi53p9q24s96pafcispgjrcb6ng6cup54ko_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti60p74cth2bs)** But I can’t do it without you. **No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,_honest_ elections... none of it matters.**Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. **[So please follow this link to sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpb8bsr8b2c5o8evvrhovlfo9gvk80log6qdq2k0_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti60p74cth2bs)** so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have _expressly_ banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.**What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020.** This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. **[That’s why, when you’ve signed your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlotum191mbhd9molnfsg36lgrjcoatt6sn8tbv0_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti60p74cth2bs), I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions.** The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. _It means we can’t be bought._ On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling _billions_ to dark money “non-profit” groups to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – **[your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution is vitally important.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8j9sqm1sf22fk0vb0dbe9hakeanuvm8bsppv7u8_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti60p74cth2bs)** Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting _and_ banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote
---
[ **SIGN THE PETITION**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zu0qookegsac5jc05k5glkp6540kvqs2acc0kcno_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti60p74cth2bs)
---
| | For Freedom,
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2onon5c2q755it03ph1sv65tf90009kaa7iirm8_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti60p74cth2bs)
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5ou23k2ler61iuv10lnuu5ktdcs4pk84qimclu8_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti60p74cth2bs)
---
| | P.S. American elections should be decided by American citizens. It’s not rocket-science. And it shouldn’t be controversial. Yet, the radical left is pouring billions into their scheme to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate. Nothing less than an amendment to the U.S. Constitution will suffice when it comes to stopping this threat. It’s basic math. | | | | “A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president. So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”~ Elon Musk | | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives and the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is already being watered down in Congress. Your vote is already being watered down in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully canceled out in future elections. American elections should be decided by American citizens., here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was before the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices. Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues. Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. But I can’t do it without you. No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,honest elections... none of it matters.Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have expressly banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020. This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. , I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions. The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. It means we can’t be bought. On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling billions to dark money “non-profit” groups to “reshape ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting and banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. name: John Papola
subject: A warning from history
body:
Before Rome fell, its citizens drifted from the virtues that built and sustained the republic.

|
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqb3n5urbe8dlk8qrn1lvgj673rk42e00aot64l0_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti6cor6cth2bs)
Friend,

“History doesn’t repeat itself, but it often rhymes.” That quote is often attributed to Mark Twain. It’s not clear if he actually said it... but the idea is spot on.

Before Rome fell, its citizens drifted from the virtues that built and sustained the republic.
* Decadence replaced discipline.
* Hedonism overshadowed hard work.
* The pursuit of comfort eclipsed the pursuit of truth.

Sound familiar?

I’m not saying America _is_ Rome. But we’re marching down a dangerous path — one we still have time to turn away from... if we act with courage, clarity, and purpose.

At Emergent Order Foundation, that’s exactly what we’re fighting for.

**We champion the virtues required for a free society to thrive** – fearlessness, integrity, autonomy, and an unflinching pursuit of the truth. These are the things that have allowed the American Dream to continue for generations. They are the ideas and philosophies that inspire EO’s stable of thought leaders in different ways.

And they are what we need right now. Because if we don’t turn this ship around, the American Dream could slip away...

[Will you help us defend American culture and prevent the collapse of the American Dream by donating today? Donate $10 or more today, and as a bonus, you will get FULL access to our Substack.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3jibg50tlt51ci4uj91435tad0a2rlgp665t3ug_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti6cor6cth2bs)
[**Donate**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0m34d5p67rldo9srliibj3jc92figf1kt20tpv0_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti6cor6cth2bs)
**Your support of Emergent Order Foundation funds the following programs:**

**⭐ Dad Saves America** [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z43tmomaul3migs9rt1lmvvgmg5detml1250j8po_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti6cor6cth2bs)
Dad Saves America is on a mission to fight America’s fatherlessness crisis, a channel that envisions a generation ready to preserve Western Civilization. We celebrate parents committed to raising resilient, strong minds, poised to thrive in a culture of liberty.

**⭐ The Censorship Files with Michael Shellenberger** [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv1ahgjh437nfm21k9frhp1ehmg9a4tif0man93g_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti6cor6cth2bs)
_The Censorship Files_ is a major documentary project that will expose how a hidden system of government and corporate censorship is reshaping American democracy.

**⭐ Strictly Education with Katharine Birbalsingh** [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfgm6u3op70nf95tp5is4jhc9v292v44jm7or0do_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti6cor6cth2bs)
Katharine Birbalsingh and Emergent Order Foundation have partnered to redefine K-12 education, providing clear, compelling educational content that equips _parents and teachers to guide our kids better than the educational blob created by oppressive government and unions._

**⭐ Radical Discourse** [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1eu1uif6t2js83uhs0h0639i0kss4kkl9oeus58_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti6cor6cth2bs)
Radical Discourse is a fusion of rhythm and reason, a platform where big ideas do battle in lyrical music video debates. What started as a creative venture has now morphed into a global phenomenon, transforming textbooks and igniting intellectual curiosity.

And through our growing Substack, we’re taking these ideas even further — publishing essays, investigations, and thought leadership that challenge the cultural drift and inspire Americans with heroic stories that enrich our culture today and hopefully _will_ for generations to come.

When you [donate ANY amount today](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlkthuuef45js5dvsnu7843o3lgbap0ovf1h06q8_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti6cor6cth2bs), you’ll receive FULL access to our Substack. Every article, every video breakdown, every deep dive.

[You can help Emergent Order Foundation empower narratives that inspire a generation to value the good, the true, and the beautiful by donating today >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2c9p2j2uq4nl6s18gva93qrm38adfso8800jkh8_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti6cor6cth2bs)
[**Donate $10 >>>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2g6sfpbju16efdt1raeqfk735nv7q9cgv2h99k0_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti6cor6cth2bs)

[**Donate $35 >>>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3qt32951661fua46k4idjbb497sul8jkl6s1sbo_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti6cor6cth2bs)

[**Donate $50 >>>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlubhdn51bjq6n0ftsgroemmbfis3q22frq45lr0_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti6cor6cth2bs)

[**Donate $100 >>>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0bjedafo75pr5e6hjcq1ot85ahujksnfi57n9j0_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti6cor6cth2bs)

[**Donate $250 >>>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh64g8bpfu70951ffpcd06ifgg087fgl6qui6ehg_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti6cor6cth2bs)

[**Donate $500 >>>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9oj8c3jqp8sspej4v3jb17rocm725l1d5dqk4n8_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti6cor6cth2bs)

[**Donate $1000 >>>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrhhm0nhd14rp2c3mssoi458j7pt7houa23heamo_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti6cor6cth2bs)

[**Donate Any Other Amount >>>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmm4gmm2bvdion2m8p86u54k8gpqrcnl1ot0sit0_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti6cor6cth2bs)
America isn’t destined to fall.

History isn’t _doomed to repeat itself if we heed its warnings_.

But that means we have to make a choice.

Do we want to follow in Rome’s footsteps? Or will we embrace a thriving, free, and civilized society that respects and defends individual dignity, supports thriving families and communities, values civil discourse, and promotes a culture of freedom?

If we act now with courage and conviction, we can preserve the American Dream for generations to come.

But we can’t do it without you.

Will you stand with us?

[**Donate**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7s0kc8b48npl8g21hjd8e1h6ab097hps901sneo_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti6cor6cth2bs)
With gratitude and determination,

John Papola
Co-Founder & CEO, Emergent Order Foundation
Host of Dad Saves America

# **[Good to be a Swiftie: Taylor hands out nearly $200M in bonuses to Eras Tour crew](http://trk.libertyledger.)**

name: Josh Williams
subject: They both betrayed America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Williams for Ohio
body:
The consequences of their betrayal are still here.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoe0j1p4um4pd98ll0orgriatjnav15phkqn1ipg_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti6eoj3cth2bs)Hey Friend,
This is MAGA Josh Williams.
Let me be crystal clear from the very beginning: I will be a HARD NO on amnesty. No ifs, ands, or buts.
When Joe Biden was in office, he threw open our borders. He let millions of illegal aliens flood into this country, and the damage is still being felt today. Fentanyl poured into our neighborhoods. Gangs spread into our towns. Wages were driven down while working families struggled just to make ends meet.
And through it all, my 40+ year Democrat incumbent opponent, Marcy Kaptur, stood shoulder-to-shoulder with Biden. She defended his failures, backed his policies, and abandoned the very people she was elected to serve.
The consequences of their betrayal are still here. Families are still burying sons and daughters lost to fentanyl. Parents are still worried about violent crime. Communities are still paying the price for Washington's weakness.
I know what it's like to be forgotten. I know what it's like to work yourself to the bone just to survive while politicians sell you out.
[That's why I will never bow to the Swamp, never bend to lobbyists, and never compromise on securing our borders.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoh015dgpvh252ri7qli5hck2m53r18a90mm2g4o_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti6eoj3cth2bs)[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjmsjptj77es0a8suhmlr2djcn2in79rbabr5fm0_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti6eoj3cth2bs)This race in Ohio's 9th District is the most important fight in America right now. If we win here, we prove that America's borders belong to Americans again.
And Friend, I need you with me. Marcy Kaptur sold out both Ohio and America, and the Swamp thinks they can get away with it. [Prove them wrong - chip in $10, $25, or even $50 today and help me show that the PEOPLE will never accept open borders and amnesty.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdqdqdkhvg44ufcmtfmft7flepesej9rf43c6jv8_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti6eoj3cth2bs)[CHIP IN HERE
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6s4apiofk3eslb4efq9b0p5sq2ogsqqfjlnjbh8_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti6eoj3cth2bs)This campaign is about more than one seat. It's about whether we learn from Biden's failures - or allow career politicians like Kaptur to keep repeating them.
Stand with me and let's make it clear: the era of open borders is OVER.
THANK YOU!
Josh WilliamsMAGA Candidate for Congress (OH-09)[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb0jnoldqvsgv30a9s2fep8d5led8h6jq5rvke60_rp22sh2s8i6eor5cti6eoj3cth2bs)

Peter,
In a pathetic display of vanity, Donald Trump accepted a completely made-up 'peace prize' from FIFA, an award created out of thin air solely to make his dream of receiving a peace prize come true like a make-a-wish dream.
This is dictator-level delusion, reminiscent of the stunts pulled by North Korean dictator Kim Jong Un.
The irony would be hilarious if his actions weren't so sickening--unleashing violence everywhere he looks.

Abroad, he has us on the brink of war with Venezuela, where he is threatening military action and indiscriminately murdering fishermen in international waters.
But the violence isn't just overseas.
Here at home, my hometown of Chicago and cities across this nation are facing down the brutality ICE is unleashing in our communities. They are snatching people off the street with no due process, firing tear gas and rubber bullets into crowds, and brutalising and persecuting peaceful protesters.
This is a regime of violence. He indiscriminately murders abroad and brutalizes our neighbors at home, all while clutching a fake trophy and demanding we call him a peacemaker. Trump is dangerous, insecure, and completely out of control.
We desperately need a Congress that will reign him in. When I get there, I will move immediately to dismantle his corruption, oppose his warmongering, and hold his officials accountable for their crimes against humanity. But I cannot do it without the resources to fight back.

This is dictator-level delusion, reminiscent of the stunts pulled by North Korean dictator Kim Jong Un. The irony would be hilarious if his actions weren't so sickening--unleashing violence everywhere he looks. | == Abroad, he has us on the brink of war with Venezuela, where he is threatening military action and indiscriminately murdering fishermen in international waters. But the violence isn't just overseas. Here at home, my hometown of Chicago and cities across this nation are facing down the brutality ICE is unleashing in our communities. They are snatching people off the street with no due process, firing tear gas and rubber bullets into crowds, and brutalising and persecuting peaceful protesters. This is a regime of violence. He indiscriminately murders abroad and brutalizes our neighbors at home, all while clutching a fake trophy and demanding we call him a peacemaker. Trump is dangerous, insecure, and completely out of control. We desperately need a Congress that will reign him in. # IN YOUR WEEKLY BULLETIN:
---
|
---
| |
This week’s Sunday Bulletin exposes a political firestorm in Upper Darby, a mayor on trial in Atlantic City, and a sweeping shake-up for one of Montgomery County’s landmark hotels—plus critical fault lines emerging in Washington and a gut-check moment for Philly sports fans:
**INVESTIGATIVE** : A blistering deep dive into Chester County’s election fiasco reveals how 75,000 missing voters, finger-pointing officials, and corporate-style leadership failures collided in a breakdown critics call “accountability in free fall.”
**REGIONAL NEWS** : From a CVS pharmacy technician arrested for stealing narcotics in Upper Darby to a dramatic house fire in Lower Gwynedd requiring a medevac, this week’s headlines hit hard. Cape May County’s tourism boom enters the national spotlight, a Delco baker turns a home kitchen into a rising Wayne storefront, and the iconic Joseph Ambler Inn sells for $5.72M with big plans ahead.
**SPORTS** : The Phillies lock down Kyle Schwarber with a blockbuster five-year deal—just as Jalen Hurts faces mounting scrutiny after a turnover-plagued disaster that has analysts asking whether the Eagles’ identity is on the brink of collapse.
**POLITICS** : Congressman Brian Fitzpatrick breaks ranks with GOP leadership on affordability and healthcare policy, while Upper Darby Council is rocked by allegations of political-party discrimination that could spark a legal battle.
**EDITORIAL** : From Trump’s agenda-turned-legislative test to biting commentary on government dysfunction, gerrymandering, and the culture of excuses in local leadership—our editors bring the tough questions, sharp angles, and unapologetic candor.
---

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: My recovery after the car crash
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Because you've been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.

Because you've been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
| [](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkUGPnDAMhX9NuDFKnECGA4dtEVIPW1U9dI_I6zgzkUhAITCaf19RTX_A3qzPz09-eh_v0zuGOaTbT4zc0xGmvE3xmZmWg_MTfeFc7kyYKeM2gYSmVlArc-pU5XpyrYaKe2XbxiopAap7_-nZthql8QDGtq1u-NNfu8YikNKMVehPJwXKKCWlai_MqnMNkvT-qrgzwsh9dVh4u9CSNs4HlnBwSGk5pyVdaInV3N9LWTeh3wSMAsaNac98eYSU2Z0KAWPe3bO-hX0OmELtM7NbYu335GrboUbnUcCIYBtSRl6tImcbffrpcS9xIowrhlsSejh_lp00AtpzU0jo4fufH_X_LC8e2YU9Cj1wxDC_4LbsmVjo4ffH9O3FaEmFUxF6-PVW5d6tjzDPYWutMPJ23v4LWb5ey9HD3wAAAP__CLmZeA)
---
Friend,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I'm doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would've been killed.
---
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.
---
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkUGPnDAMhX9NuDFKnECGA4dtEVIPW1U9dI_I6zgzkUhAITCaf19RTX_A3qzPz09-eh_v0zuGOaTbT4zc0xGmvE3xmZmWg_MTfeFc7kyYKeM2gYSmVlArc-pU5XpyrYaKe2XbxiopAap7_-nZthql8QDGtq1u-NNfu8YikNKMVehPJwXKKCWlai_MqnMNkvT-qrgzwsh9dVh4u9CSNs4HlnBwSGk5pyVdaInV3N9LWTeh3wSMAsaNac98eYSU2Z0KAWPe3bO-hX0OmELtM7NbYu335GrboUbnUcCIYBtSRl6tImcbffrpcS9xIowrhlsSejh_lp00AtpzU0jo4fufH_X_LC8e2YU9Cj1wxDC_4LbsmVjo4ffH9O3FaEmFUxF6-PVW5d6tjzDPYWutMPJ23v4LWb5ey9HD3wAAAP__CLmZeA)
---
One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom - _the highest civilian honor in America._**
---
**President Trump knows I 'm in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
---
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more ...**
---
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left's sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That's why I'm making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.
---
__Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__

clean_body: Because you've been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me. Because you've been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me. | Friend, So many kind souls like you have asked how I'm doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery. I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would've been killed. Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together. But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive ANYTHING! One thing especially helped take the pain away... ...President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom - the highest civilian honor in America. President Trump knows I 'm in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to federal cases, which means he legally cannot save me from the bogus state-level charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS. Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. And now, this car crash has set me back even more ... And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left's sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That's why I'm making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my FREEDOM and my JUSTICE. Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Pop Acta Media | Conservative Innovation PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

body:
[Two U.S. Army soldiers and a U.S. civilian interpreter were killed](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOgzAQRL_GdCB2sYEULq6hy7VXIgcvYU8GI68TxN-fyC9cN9JIM3rv5z7eHQfent9uJZvnOG50SKCcKY0Sg2dK4tbHSxbyvMmZ2C00Yo2mBCxBj95xOEddeDsTITUFWeha00GNt1uxWGNwrjsDaKYHOQcem6lF0_u51Y3Wt4LttQYIGqDWpqughd51LdDcN9r0qHRNnnNM1W_kLS80hzO-KVVTXItgl5x3Uc2XwkHhcBxHNT3korh6hcMVFQ6yxCzlS8oPQ5lTjLuUuwvrmZzCoUjW7weHwNJ2StfP1XH4XOR_eXlb_AsAAP__NsB3MA) on Saturday after shots were fired at U.S. and Syrian forces in a historic central town in Syria.

# Sunday, December 14, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1799, [George Washington](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2u3CAUxfHV4A6Li8EfBUUad5M2pYWHi7kRhhGQsbz7aJ7eDl79k86R_n8e28NSpHT8tiea5vOW8KoRW8Oy1RwdYan23P_VgI5SvQvZgJsUUnOQHNTmLMV7U50zHlHi0KGBadQTCLksXTB-dvu4uP3pwQMI9ChRaLFMetZ6wqEj81kDCQpAKD31MMJspxHQz4PSs2RKoKOWS_83U2oBfbzzG0v_zGcXTWjtVdnwi8mVyfW6rj5QbbncH2dybYEqd_bmlPi3MLk6fOK5Y-GgmFwPzOVAftkaKB0tJ-4Ia1eMe10UI9VxYkocp6X49dp-lOpt5P8AAAD__-1Cfog), the leader of the American Revolution and the first president of the United States, died at his estate in Mount Vernon, Virginia, at the age of 67. Beginning in the 1950s, _Dear Abby_ and _Ann Landers_ were the original social influencers, shaping American culture with their newspaper advice columns. Read about their legacy in today's _[Whatever Happened To...](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMGOpCAURb8GdxhAEF2wqMzEzKZm1UkvDcqzoINg4FUZ_75T_Qu9vjcnJ-fzPt9tiCE9_tsdDG55TnDWCIhQ5pqjC1Cq3Zdn9eBCqlcJ1sMsmFCUC8rl7GyI1ywbZzYAAV0Dhuteac7EODbe8NX1o9V6Yd3YSSbZKCVXAHqQq1Mdb4J507jgknMmlW55zwerew7b0Ek1CCIZuIC5tF85JPSwxSu_oLRr3ptoPOJRSXcjYiJiOs-zrdvDIrxnIiZICAVtSDskJGKyBcMagYjpXz7pX7CF3pblomuOzz3RirYgOGqRfnigf3zJ6f2nHddKKNUe_miKcccZYgy110Syx25D_LHBXyV8GfEdAAD__5iyhPM)_ section. If you believe every child deserves hope, stability, and someone in their corner, today's sponsor, [Prison Fellowship International](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkM_qozAURp8m7irmjzFdZDFQ3HW2s5SrudE7JEaS2OLbDx36Br_t4ePwcf48pydQoH39DRFt9Wna8V0C1op5Kik4wlwgzmfZ0NFerkyw4SQ60d-4uHE1OaBwTapx1iMKlA1aPuh-4J2435vNivtivJGzdxqNVx0uyvf9AMZoLdWMDdmPjQuuOO9UP7RccwOD5uiNVL0RTHXoqKbc_k201w19uNILc7uk2AS71XoUJn8xMTIxurSnfKRcIbSHpzbllYnxgBWZGJeNgsu4f6ZyPGucSjrzgkw-vk4m9AdHdHRGJh8HkPuyBeIBtO5MPt7zXHy4wHV9k6073hQCFT0w1a0RKPx_Vn-U82XFvwAAAP__WCeK4A), is working to bring that light into the lives of children affected by a parent's incarceration.
|
---
## Two Army Soldiers, Civilian Killed in Syria
[Two U.S. Army soldiers and a civilian interpreter were killed](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOgzAQRL_GdCB2sYEULq6hy7VXIgcvYU8GI68TxN-fyC9cN9JIM3rv5z7eHQfent9uJZvnOG50SKCcKY0Sg2dK4tbHSxbyvMmZ2C00Yo2mBCxBj95xOEddeDsTITUFWeha00GNt1uxWGNwrjsDaKYHOQcem6lF0_u51Y3Wt4LttQYIGqDWpqughd51LdDcN9r0qHRNnnNM1W_kLS80hzO-KVVTXItgl5x3Uc2XwkHhcBxHNT3korh6hcMVFQ6yxCzlS8oPQ5lTjLuUuwvrmZzCoUjW7weHwNJ2StfP1XH4XOR_eXlb_AsAAP__NsB3MA) in an ambush on Saturday after shots were fired at U.S. and Syrian forces near Palmyra, Syria. [Three other service members were injured](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OqzAQhZ8GOiPP2JikcHGbdLntlsjB4zArg5HthOXtV-QVtj1HOj_f1328O468Pv-7hWwNaVxpL5FqpTyWFD1TLm55vMpMntdyZHYzjSixF4AC9Ogdx2PUrbeBCEm1ZGEw_QASr9d2tg9lJqWUDw-UgBp1GEAqPxnZq0kbaNmeaYCgAaTuhw4MXNxggMJF6f6CjZbkuabcfSde60whHulNuZvS0kY717qVRv1r8Nbgbd_3LqSf88Xpn0rK0Td4exXxmb-KmlPaipjSQuK1esoicCaxzxxJbK7mFEWmLeXaZuu3nWPkYoZGy-fiOH56659gvS3-BgAA__94u393) in the incident and taken by helicopters to the al-Tanf garrison near the border with Iraq and Jordan. The ambush was carried out by [a lone Islamic State gunman](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOnTAQRb_GdCB7bLApXKSh27Qp0Tw8LJPYjyd7dhF_H22K_MDWV7o65_x6W9-QMz_ff2KhKPu5PulqmUSoru3Miak2LI-PdlDiZ7sr40EraBh7A71xa0LO9-q6FHciINtRNH4avdEwz90Rw8M9rLHaow3zqHEKM0zbTiY8zBY233H8ejNgnDHajX4wkwnoJ0N7sG4MoJymxHLW4ffJTzloz_f5SXXYztLleIi8mrI_FCwKluu6hiaVX9S-dgWLHIRCtSlYCqeUaSVsomD5L2EVLB-tL5xZsN79C3O5K_YogtufHrT23s56OKTkrsb0ujhnbpNXTr8X5PyPRL6V7zPC3wAAAP__DwOCVw), U.S. Central Command said. The gunman was engaged and killed. The U.S. maintains about 1,000 troops in Syria, primarily as part of its anti-ISIS efforts. After the fall of longtime dictator Bashar al-Assad last year, the new government in Damascus pledged to work with the U.S.-led coalition to counter the Islamic State in Syria.
## Police Respond to Brown University Shooting
Rhode Island police responded on Saturday to [an active shooting with multiple gunshot victims](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMHOnCAUhZ8Gdxi5oowLFtM07v5uJmmXBuUy3hbBADPGt2-cV_h3JznJyfm-P1_TlyFP4fnLbKiLi1PAI3ssBdOUo7eEKZttfuUVLYV8JjIrTtBAxwVwISdryJ-TrKx2iIBthVqovlOigWGoVt3Ns5qbocehUdb1IBfnYJEShhbdYFVF-loTIKQQjexULXpxM6oX6G6t7G7AZIOWSkz130ihrOj8Gd-Y6iVulddrKXtm7Z3ByGA8jqPecrg6BiMG_soMxguKwfjJe_S0IE-Y9xgsL5En3GMqaHleYywUntwUPqd4BP4K9MaUqZycAk9rtMgpexMsg9Ekfr-LB7l_v1k7xoUsa3_-uGTikR-Y9ippux_kPeVeMdk8N0P-c7t8y_Vbw_8AAAD__8cmlX8) near Brown University's Barus & Holley building, which houses the School of Engineering and Physics. The university's campus alert system warned students of an[ active shooter shortly after 4:20](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1uxCAUhE-DO1bwwH8FRRp3mzalxZrn9UswWIBt-faRc4U004z0aeb7eo5PS57C-9OuaMocx4Bn9lgKpjFH7whTtutrzws6CvlKZBccQUDNJXCpR2fJX6OunJkRAVWFRrZN3UoBfV8txqlZYCuElPXkZuVAdMqqvul7aHTT64rMTZMgtZRC1-1DNrKzbSNx7pSuO2BaoKMS0-M7UigLzv6KB6bHFNfKm6WULTP1wWBgMIRri7ncFYPhBjMYJNyhGAx75vc_BoOdCh3I8xJjwcRt4a8Uz8D3QAemTOXidFzco33vyCe7bnvmMXAfpx8Xz8BgqJJx20neU25apsV7teT_RpV_mTwM_AYAAP__Z4CG7g) p.m. A second emergency alert just before 5 p.m., announcing the arrest of a suspect, was retracted as authorities are still searching for a suspect or suspects. Police scanner audio shared on social media referenced unconfirmed reports of up to 20 casualties. The scene remains active with [officials still gathering information](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2OrDAQBODTmMwIN-ZnAgcvIZuXboga3Ix7ZeyR7QFx-xV7hU0qKekrqb6e8xPZc3j9x51M2eIc6MyeSqE05-gtU8q4L5_syHLIV2J0NEMDnVQglZ4tsr9mXVmzEQG1FRk19N2gGng8Kmd6HAGGcQNsYMVBg1aKwAJZ1Eu_jhWbW1OgtFKN7oZa9WrEoVe0ja3uRhC6Icslpvo7ciiONn_Fg1K9xr3yxpXyzqL9J2ASMJ3nWa9hWe9SwHTTAiYFd7QCpiXFM8hP4INS5nLJjFeWuBY-SGYXY6EkY5Ar7u9Prl3ZfZWMfZ_sPed-ELp57cj-d7z86bHDwE8AAAD__-fYfyY). Saturday was the second day of final exams for the university's fall semester.
## List: Popular Festive Holiday Drinks
When it comes to fun holiday beverages, [hot chocolate and apple cider](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFyqzAQRb8GOjFokRAUKl7jzq9NyaytldlESIwkm-HvM04-If2de-acj-tyRQ4cH_9xI1t9WiIdJVCtlJeSgmPKBbfbs6zkOJYzM660QA9aSBBSLQ45nItqnfVEQENLVppRG9nDPLerRQV3b8AMcKN-9rdZ98Mwo_QwGO0QW7bvNwlSSdkrbTo5ygnNKMlPg9ITNKonxzXl7jNxrCv5cKYX5e6etjbYtda9NMO_Bi4NXI7j6HxKDqM7ONJ708BlS6WKPe3PgFmsKbDDU7jM8asIjgI3ynxH8aslp9GMoNts3X5wCFxG06j-sSGHH2b9U6iXhe8AAAD__zmxfCk) remain the most popular choices, a new survey suggests. According to Coffeeness, which relied on Google search terms, [hot cocoa](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO6yAQRb8Gd7GYMRinoHiNu7x2S4uYcZgVNhGwQf77VbbfassrXZ0jnY_bcnMc-Xj8dzvZuqXloFYi1Up5KSl6plzcfv8qgTwf5czsAi0oUV8AL6AW7ziei-q83YiQho4smFEbkHi9dsEOk1yNQb1qGDaiEe7aSy2Hu5pGY4zr2L5pgKAApNKmhxEmZ0agbRqUnlAoSZ5ryv1n4qMG2uKZXpT7Ne1dtKHWZxHDP4GzwLm11m8peXf4xge9PwJnT6VQrkXgvIa0pugqCZxDqpdfd5etfzaOkctohJKP3XH8cdY_hXpZ_A4AAP__SAh9YQ) is the drink of choice in 13 states, particularly in cold-weather locations. Apple cider and [espresso martinis](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOhCAYBp9GOw0gihQU12y3115pcPlY_wuCAW6Nb3_Ze4XrJzPJfN2Xu6VA8flpd5jq0xJxloBakZeSgiPkYvf1p2xwFMuVyW5YBBNjx0XH5eIshWuRrTMeEBhaGK6mUXEmtG43I5iXWs9q5Zp5tj6kncZVMQ2Hlc0YWzJvGxdccs7kqHo-8dmqicPPgxxn0UgGRzXl_jtRrBt8uNILuX-kvQ1mq_UozfDRiFsjbud59j4lZ6M7KeLNNOJ22Lyj2Ng9NqCgQzkySkndbnOlSJ0alJyVbrNxx0khUJlUI9lztxT-OvVfc15G_AYAAP__39h5CQ) are the go-to in 11 states. The amaretto sour and French 75 also remain a popular tradition in a few locations. One time-honored holiday classic, however, seems to have lost its appeal: eggnog was a no-show as a top choice.

**Whatever happened to _Dear Abby_?** For nearly 70 years, if you had a family squabble, an awkward etiquette dilemma, or a mother-in-law driving you nuts, you knew where to turn. You'd flip open the paper to a familiar voice who never used more than a pen name, yet felt like a trusted friend: _Dear Abby_.

But "Abby" wasn't a name at all. It was a brand. A media empire built on compassion and, occasionally, a bit of perfectly placed sarcasm. The column began in 1956, written by Pauline Phillips using the pseudonym Abigail Van Buren. [Read the first column here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkT2PnzwQxD-N6Yzw2ualoEB3QqdHuqc6KSUysPxxYmxk7x2hyWeP4JLm2jTWz5qd0Wrn2-vwaqyz_vG_2bClJQwej-SQCOOQgpstxmS28T2tOFufzmjNigMUoLkALtQwG-vOQWVzuyACygxbUZW6EgU0Tba2tVgWHHUh1dgUFRipJrE0EoRqGlGrObPtlSZAKCEKpatclKI2VSlwqaXSNTBV4GwpxPx7sJ5WXNwZPjDmU9gy165Ee2KyY9Az6I_jyNPyMISXzKBHTxjJWL-hJwa9iWQnhwz6l3DwZzSRd-N48im4983zRCYSztwQf1uRP60x-GueS1Fp0Drf152BZLL7xWRH-JOYfH7ByEBDsdiY6KbPtBv_Mz6_obnepxtFo8sb3lb84rw2uqEbRzy_hjGofaBPD_3xph3dVeH9Gc3046_qGTRZbOf9sM7ZVFZMFY_NWHdfjv6p7o8WfgcAAP__FhW0xg). Soon, it exploded in popularity, but Pauline had an identical twin, [Esther Lederer](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL3OozAQAJ_GdCDvYv4KF9fQ5dor0QYvsDljR7YTlLc_5V7ha6eYkebPbbmReAn7bzrZli0uga_suRROS47eCadM5_2VD3YS8icJHbygxq4GrMEsjsR_FlM5uzEjtxVbGPpuAI3TVB221aZnmCY23doBTe3aAq99j06Pm9uGSuzXBggGQJtuaKCHkYYeeBtb042ojGYnJabmESWUgzf_iW9OzRrPytujlGdW7S-Fs8L5cVET065wLofki_nvF768wlkbhTNMMCqcKYTaU3Ccck3B1XSXncTXbwr1_ZU4VMm65yXeS-4HZfR-kvj_xfKjTW-L_wIAAP__PsJ6ZQ), who wrote a rival nationally syndicated advice column: _Ann Landers._ This famous sister rivalry defined their careers. At their peak, the pair reached more than 200 million daily readers combined, essentially becoming the original social influencers shaping American culture. As Pauline aged, she began transitioning the column to her daughter, Jeanne Phillips, who fully took over in 2002. Pauline Phillips [passed away in 2013](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFy6yAQheGnQZ01sEJCLihuo8533KVkNmKxNkGgAWyP3z7jvEK6c5qv-D8u7oIcOd3-4062hewSPWuk1qi4mqNnKhX3z3vdyHOqr8K4kQMJ40nBSWnnkePL6c7bQAQ0dGSVmUajJJzP3WYDGQxGaoRxxtFA0CsNMkhaVznjPHVs35oCpZWSejS9mtSMZlIU5kGPMwgtyXPLpf_KnNpGIb7yg0q_5r2LdmvtqGL4J2ARsFDqn_zNB3nGPpebgOX9BSxXvEdO5K4bx8hH7Yr1x_O962SElrcdOf6a7U8hHhZ-AgAA___3tHJn) after battling Alzheimer's.

Today, the voice has changed slightly--a little more modern, a little less biting--but the heart remains the same: Be kind, be honest, and be witty. You can find new columns every day at [dearabby.com](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFugzAURuGnMVsQ92JsGDx0YUvXjsiOf4IrA5HthPL2VfoK3Y--4Xxdp6sNMWz3T7vClHmfNhw5ohSkKe_RB6RsV_fMC3zY8pmCXTBxw92F-EJy8jbEc5KVNzPAaCsY0qrT1PAwVIu5aTkTQA3B9XpQA6AUe-cct0PnUQXz1ohJEjWy0zUp6q1WhLlvZdezkA18KHuqv_ewlQVzPPcXUn3b1yqapZRHFu2H4FHweBxH_cTPIyHndyB4jGGG4NHDJuvcWSXjH0eIMWSlhWzuqw3xzyr_GvAy_BsAAP__dmVveQ), where Jeanne Phillips now fields questions about group texts, HOA disputes, social media oversharing, and the eternal challenge of adult children who won't move out. _Were you a fan of Dear Abby --or did you prefer her sister, Ann Landers? Let us know by replying to this email._

Anyone can activate these cells today just by adding to their breakfast! the amazing fruit that's making diabetes drugs absolutely useless! | Whatever happened to Dear Abby? For nearly 70 years, if you had a family squabble, an awkward etiquette dilemma, or a mother-in-law driving you nuts, you knew where to turn. You'd flip open the paper to a familiar voice who never used more than a pen name, yet felt like a trusted friend: Dear Abby. But "Abby" wasn't a name at all. It was a brand. A media empire built on compassion and, occasionally, a bit of perfectly placed sarcasm. The column began in 1956, written by Pauline Phillips using the pseudonym Abigail Van Buren. . Soon, it exploded in popularity, but Pauline had an identical twin, , who wrote a rival nationally syndicated advice column: Ann Landers. This famous sister rivalry defined their careers. At their peak, the pair reached more than 200 million daily readers combined, essentially becoming the original social influencers shaping American culture. As Pauline aged, she began transitioning the column to her daughter, Jeanne Phillips, who fully took over in 2002. Pauline Phillips after battling Alzheimer's. Today, the voice has changed slightly--a little more modern, a little less biting--but the heart remains the same: Be kind, be honest, and be witty. You can find new columns every day at , where Jeanne Phillips now fields questions about group texts, HOA disputes, social media oversharing, and the eternal challenge of adult children who won't move out. Were you a fan of Dear Abby --or did you prefer her sister, Ann Landers? | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

name: Free Thinker Daily
subject: What This Marine Nutrient Does That Ibuprofen Can’t
body:
A Natural Inflammation Solution That Supports Your Whole Body

---
| | | | | |
---
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e160188/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvWWpocHBrTWh1SA/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEyMTQ/LbmNsM0VLdU5keg/qP2hpZHM9bmNaMUFjUTU4VXJkcHlscw/gaT6jzA/s5m514fd275)
| |
---
| | | For decades, ibuprofen has been the go-to for inflammation and pain. But while it may dull discomfort temporarily, it often comes at a cost—potentially harming your gut, liver, and heart with long-term use.
Now, researchers are turning their attention to something far more promising: a marine-derived compound that actually works with your body’s natural systems—resolving inflammation at the source rather than masking it.
Even more impressive? This breakthrough nutrient doesn’t just help with pain. It also supports brain, heart, and liver health—three systems ibuprofen may compromise over time.
Whether you’re dealing with joint stiffness, post-workout soreness, or chronic pain /inflammation, this could be the upgrade your body’s been waiting for.
[👉](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e160188/VaHR0cHM6Ly9mYi5uYXRpdmVwYXRoLmNvbS9yZC9yLnBocA/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEyMTQ/LbmNsM0VLdU5keg/qP3NpZD02NDUmcHViPTI0MDU3MyZjMT0yMDI1MTIxMy1GVEQtMTUwMCZjMj1LT0ImYzM9RlRE/gaT6jzA/s1g2f00ceb1) **[Discover the Marine Nutrient Changing How We Treat Inflammation](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e160188/VaHR0cHM6Ly9mYi5uYXRpdmVwYXRoLmNvbS9yZC9yLnBocA/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTEyMTQ/LbmNsM0VLdU5keg/qP3NpZD02NDUmcHViPTI0MDU3MyZjMT0yMDI1MTIxMy1GVEQtMTUwMCZjMj1LT0ImYzM9RlRE/gaT6jzA/s1g2f00ceb1)**

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Cold Front, Selena's Father Dies, and Christmas at Zoo
body:
A strong cold front is [bringing freezing temperatures to Texas](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGurCAQBuCnwU4DI7haUNzGbm97SzPCsJIgGCDr7n36E32F000yk_nz_f-eyxN98PH1F3fS9ePSEuksgWqlvJgUrMsp1kKBIhaHdaNsPS3AQbUCWiEXiz58F9lYvXI7iYa0eAzqIfphnJpNr7JfB0TgY28UOFJozSqVs2hUz41pvL6eCRBSABcwdGqarlkB58jlODDJyfqaclc3qvTB4sI3vSl3Ju1N0FutR2H9HwYzg_k8z27_FowYa4o-XUcM5kt1bekmMJgxV28CMZgvZXszW5eJ_lN7h7QgoB8n3nfHdjRZ2-P0IfgyPJjkrx19uPPr71p7a_gJAAD__6cngdo) starting Saturday as part of a polar vortex sweeping the U.S.

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykUr2O3CAYfBrcsYKPH98WLhJZ7i5VpJQIw-ddJDAWsOfbt4_s2zRpUqRD88MMI369m3cbYlhvP2zCoX0u2ay414itYTEuR7-UvLaKEVdbF9vuWHxAAwwU5UC5NN6G-DSy88PM_JV3OPBeq54L_Xbt7oMHqfwstdJLL_iivNB-7lFqJa1TCrswHJdx4JID46Av6no9zgoYs0y-aSIZ-tByubQ7Nvy0dYnP_IHl4nLq4nBvbatEfCMwEZj2fb_MWJsLN1u2EhzWQ0dgOhHqQ0HXcnkSmHzBnWJttiE92foXWPLTRupyjOhayCtVXzpabdoiFgpKCg5HspiqjRg8ESNclRQ9Af1oydT8KA6JGH8ezQl8n77Kv-iEPjwSESMmG-ILdDZtNtzWPy7zerDx6DDNWM79zVhwfznO3H9qxVRwIWLUjtmuDH7bQ4yh6p5Idjvyz0Xb__2DjwF-BwAA__-6z8p6) | |
# Sunday, December 14, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1918, J. Marvin Leonard, known as "Mr. Marvin," opened his first department store in Fort Worth. His brother Obadiah, known as "Mr. Obie," joined him the next year to form [Leonard Brothers](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO6yAQRb8Gd7FgggkuKF7jLq_d0gIzDmgJE8EoTv5-lf2F7W51j875uq5Xn0uut__-jo5fO60Vj16QGdu6UYl7o8odC1bfd88JW8y4goTppOCk9Bp9Lu9VD9EFGWc1oFMXM13U2dh5SM6GeZqVN1ZDCCZsGtDaHcKGYM1m9JDd50yB0gqkAjNO8_zZE0jppbZGaIkxM7WREzK-fN_Lm57Yxo3uQ3GJ-dHF-Z-ARcByHMfIPXmqJVccqd0ELMnXGIi-BSxYuWXsApaCVH2Lp9Doo9WH5uLjyKXkbi5Cy9vd5_LL4L-VeTr4CQAA__-v6HiF), which thrived for many years on a business model encapsulated in its slogan, "More merchandise for less money." The chain was sold to the Tandy Corporation in 1967 and to Dillard's in 1974. We're reporting today on a new Austin policy that [waives some parking tickets](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL9u9CAQxJ8Gdz7BGmNTUHyNu_valBZnlvPqOGPB5v68feREeYI0q5VmND_NfJzns6dE2_W_v6PjV8zzhs-akBnLvOQUYskbV0y4-Ro9r1gC4QwS-lZBq_QcPKX3rJvgLjJY1aBTg-kH1ZnRNqvzcpGXrlvGqLXtwgijstEMizSqH6O2DbkjTIHSCqQCc-qtPf4epPRSj0ZoiYE4lxOvyPjyNaZ3fmA5LfneJLcy71V0_wRMAib_WZm2PVc-ZAHT0UfAdEAETAp-z4-x3X250XZtmZYbcvv09MDSFBf2J6VE1QxCy-vdU_rG8d9Gejj4CgAA__8T3Xlg) for drivers who used a rideshare or sober ride home. Learn how to have a ticket waived in _Around_ _Texas_ below. When you need gifts that people will actually love, _[The Flyover Christmas Guide](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykzz1uAyEUBODTQGeLx_JjCoo07pw2JWLNYxcJLxa8-Of20Ua5QbqRZvRJ83UJl1hq2ZbPeENPr9zChs9RkQh7uLaacm8bDay4xZEjrdhTwSCF1AeQB1AhxVLfQfHkZ5EccPRgjbYwmZPjqzdW52gRYJ5AGANpxqxFTJOz0Uyz48XvGEhQIAVIc9TO7VlLIaJQJ8OUwFSo9SOtSPiKI9d3e2A_XtuNV78S3QebPpg8M3mmFf_qpWRavkvCfcfkmXef7s9SaxnGMiWWWyz116D_PX94-RMAAP__PIRsrA)_ is your shortcut. If you're anything like us at _The Flyover_ , you'll love that today's sponsor, [Best Cigar Prices](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykUr2O3CAYfBrcsYKPH98WLhJZ7i5VpJQIw-ddJDAWsOfbt4_s2zRpUqRD88MMI369m3cbYlhvP2zCoX0u2ay414itYTEuR7-UvLaKEVdbF9vuWHxAAwwU5UC5NN6G-DSy88PM_JV3OPBeq54L_Xbt7oMHqfwstdJLL_iivNB-7lFqJa1TCrswHJdx4JID46Av6no9zgoYs0y-aSIZ-tByubQ7Nvy0dYnP_IHl4nLq4nBvbatEfCMwEZj2fb_MWJsLN1u2EhzWQ0dgOhHqQ0HXcnkSmHzBnWJttiE92foXWPLTRupyjOhayCtVXzpabdoiFgpKCg5HspiqjRg8ESNclRQ9Af1oydT8KA6JGH8ezQl8n77Kv-iEPjwSESMmG-ILdDZtNtzWPy7zerDx6DDNWM79zVhwfznO3H9qxVRwIWLUjtmuDH7bQ4yh6p5Idjvyz0Xb__2DjwF-BwAA__-6z8p6), is offering a luxury 5-cigar sampler that delivers premium flavor without the premium markup.
