clean_body: = Can I get a bit more personal than usual? This is a photo of me and my late grandmother, Polly. I’ve been feeling nostalgic and reflecting on why I got involved in politics — and my story starts with her. My grandmother was my first role model and my fiercest supporter. At a time when few women were involved in politics, Polly was a force – a fixture in Albany and the first person to raise their hand and volunteer. Growing up, I stuffed envelopes with Grandma Polly on weekends and slapped bumper stickers on cars — learning that civic participation is a responsibility that all of us should take seriously. She was a fiery example of what it looks like to advocate loudly for anyone without a voice. She NEVER backed down from an argument she knew she could win. I’m thinking a lot about the example Grandma Polly set for me, especially now that we’re preparing for our biggest fight yet: flipping the Senate in 2026. We can’t be complacent in this work. The stakes are too high and I refuse to let MAGA Republicans corrupt our government and erase our progress any longer. But if we’re serious about getting this done, we need this movement to step up and make sure we have the resources we need to invest big in our Senate work before our final public fundraising deadline on December 31st. Republicans already have shady super PACs and billionaires pouring dark money into battleground Senate races across the country. I’m carrying on Grandma Polly’s legacy by advocating loudly and unapologetically in the Senate for everyone who needs a voice — and I’m ready to elect even more fierce Democrats to the Senate in the midterms.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = Let’s fight for our futures and make all the Grandma Pollys of the world proud. — Kirsten Gillibrand * A message from DSCC Chair Kirsten Gillibrand: =

Peter, Trump’s Justice Department continues to fight against our democracy rather than protect it. This time, they’re intervening to block California’s new congressional map. That’s right: They’re trying to overturn the map that the majority of voters approved. The hypocrisy is astounding. Trump’s Department of Justice is more intent on overturning the results of a free and fair election than it is on restoring the voting power of communities of color in states like Texas, where Republican politicians recently passed a gerrymander that strips fair representation away from countless voters. **Let me be clear: This is a blatant attempt to thwart the will of the people.[We need the full strength of this grassroots movement to speak out against the federal government being weaponized against voters.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121256633/588862737/-1027206931?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_DOJMeddling_email_20251214-NDRC-Tier1-DOJMeddling_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251214-NDRC-Tier1-DOJMeddling_&utm_campaign=DOJMeddling&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxZmExMDkzLWZkZDgtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8IxCp5SYyT68jQwDIwMX5n5a_tegE5jpDHD8e-EoNzg=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

As A.G. Holder put it: “Unlike the scheme imposed on the citizens of Texas, **Californians just overwhelmingly voted in favor of the state’s new congressional map by nearly 30 percentage points** at the ballot box to fight back against Trump’s gerrymandering scheme. **That resounding rejection by the people clearly terrifies many Republicans and the Trump White House** — it’s no wonder they are now resorting to hypocritical, desperate, and truly absurd lawsuits while at the same time continuing to beg Republicans across the country to gerrymander, all in an effort to circumvent the will of the people.”
**It’s clear: The fair maps movement has our work cut out for us. We must come together to protect our democracy from this attack and any attempt to silence the will of voters. **

name: Trisha Calvarese
subject: What’s going on in CO has real potential to turn violent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
Calls for a military raid against a CO prison. Trump has thrown down the gauntlet and is setting off a full blown constitutional crisis.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Bgfytba_gKTQazmJZ1JfZVuzcMvYoIeI57zwVI-R06a-k3jaDrPDDBbVClm7ivRZ1Szo3N-OXwyJO2SSRr23o2tY5O5N-gy4N_6apqm8TV1Ii3TDyzYER1mPw_GDFJSCt1qgwPMLIxcBRf8hmyel7sdPNL3j4Hy5K_i0r6t5JciQCy1aEHA90_dmpy5XuoStLioDsToPSo8ZYd5SrB_ZYhgTMz2oGJ7w&c=idAvK1V93lWCOtNMeDUTgUCgXCkQXec1wde1KRUbMOMBmNqG7cw7ww==&ch=4C7rLpdIKvIRjoMwgRtpAMx19xHJbJlPAdPTEfmIU1GdvPvFOMc8jQ==)
---
|

Peter,
What's unfolding in Colorado right now has the real potential of turning violent.
Trump just pardoned Tina Peters, a former Mesa Colorado county clerk serving a nine year state sentence for letting unauthorized operatives access voting machines in an attempt to prop up Trump's 2020 election lie.
Presidents do not have the power to pardon state crimes. Trump did it anyway and has thrown down the gauntlet setting off a full blown Constitutional crisis.
Colorado is refusing to comply. And now Peter's lawyers are openly calling for Trump to order a military raid to break her out of state custody. And right at the center of this chaos? Lauren Boebert.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Bgfytba_gKTQazmJZ1JfZVuzcMvYoIeI57zwVI-R06a-k3jaDrPDDBbVClm7ivRZ1Szo3N-OXwyJO2SSRr23o2tY5O5N-gy4N_6apqm8TV1Ii3TDyzYER1mPw_GDFJSCt1qgwPMLIxcBRf8hmyel7sdPNL3j4Hy5K_i0r6t5JciQCy1aEHA90_dmpy5XuoStLioDsToPSo8ZYd5SrB_ZYu5HfXbGQLMR&c=idAvK1V93lWCOtNMeDUTgUCgXCkQXec1wde1KRUbMOMBmNqG7cw7ww==&ch=4C7rLpdIKvIRjoMwgRtpAMx19xHJbJlPAdPTEfmIU1GdvPvFOMc8jQ==)
---
She is leading the charge to free Peters and is pouring gasoline on a situation that has the real potential to spiral into violence.
It gets worse.
MAGA extremist podcaster--Joe Oltmann, a key Boebert ally, resident of her district, and fundraiser for her --has publicly called for the execution of Governor Jared Polis and Attorney General Phil Weiser for not releasing Peters.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Bgfytba_gKTQazmJZ1JfZVuzcMvYoIeI57zwVI-R06a-k3jaDrPDDBbVClm7ivRZ1Szo3N-OXwyJO2SSRr23o2tY5O5N-gy4N_6apqm8TV1Ii3TDyzYER1mPw_GDFJSCt1qgwPMLIxcBRf8hmyel7sdPNL3j4Hy5K_i0r6t5JciQCy1aEHA90_dmpy5XuoStLioDsToPSo8ZYd5SrB_ZYrYFce5eHXpd&c=idAvK1V93lWCOtNMeDUTgUCgXCkQXec1wde1KRUbMOMBmNqG7cw7ww==&ch=4C7rLpdIKvIRjoMwgRtpAMx19xHJbJlPAdPTEfmIU1GdvPvFOMc8jQ==)
---

This is headed somewhere very dark. When you excuse crimes, undermine elections, and glorify political violence, people get hurt. This is exactly how democracies crack, piece by piece, as extremists like Boebert test how far they can go.
Trisha Calvarese is the Democrat running against Lauren Boebert and in 2024, when our campaign went head to head with her, she had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in the district, outperforming Kamala Harris by 6 points. Trisha is running because Colorado, and this country, cannot survive leaders who cheer on chaos, defend criminals, and flirt with violence to stay in power. We must defeat Boebert and drive this brand of extremism out of office before someone gets killed.

clean_body: Calls for a military raid against a CO prison. Trump has thrown down the gauntlet and is setting off a full blown constitutional crisis. | | | | | == | Peter, What's unfolding in Colorado right now has the real potential of turning violent. Trump just pardoned Tina Peters, a former Mesa Colorado county clerk serving a nine year state sentence for letting unauthorized operatives access voting machines in an attempt to prop up Trump's 2020 election lie. Presidents do not have the power to pardon state crimes. Trump did it anyway and has thrown down the gauntlet setting off a full blown Constitutional crisis. Colorado is refusing to comply. And now Peter's lawyers are openly calling for Trump to order a military raid to break her out of state custody. And right at the center of this chaos? Lauren Boebert. | == She is leading the charge to free Peters and is pouring gasoline on a situation that has the real potential to spiral into violence. It gets worse. MAGA extremist podcaster--Joe Oltmann, a key Boebert ally, resident of her district, and fundraiser for her --has publicly called for the execution of Governor Jared Polis and Attorney General Phil Weiser for not releasing Peters. | == This is headed somewhere very dark. When you excuse crimes, undermine elections, and glorify political violence, people get hurt. This is exactly how democracies crack, piece by piece, as extremists like Boebert test how far they can go. Trisha Calvarese is the Democrat running against Lauren Boebert and in 2024, when our campaign went head to head with her, she had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in the district, outperforming Kamala Harris by 6 points. Trisha is running because Colorado, and this country, cannot survive leaders who cheer on chaos, defend criminals, and flirt with violence to stay in power. We must defeat Boebert and drive this brand of extremism out of office before someone gets killed. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == | This moment demands courage. name: Trump Enemies via Our Revolution
subject: Bombshell memo just leaked – and we’re in the crosshairs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34051?t=1011&refcode=email-20251214_v&akid=9968%2E5885482%2E3p6zKF ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

A bombshell leaked memo just directed Trump’s Department of Justice to
compile a list of "domestic terrorism" groups accused of "anti-American
sentiment." These are the tactics of dictators – and now, they’re being
aimed directly at grassroots organizations like Our Revolution.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34051?source=email-20251214&t=1060&akid=9968%2E5885482%2E3p6zKF ]Headline: Leaked Memo shows Pam Bondi wants list of 'domestic
terrorism' groups who express 'anti-American sentiment

We’re staring down a dark turn in American history – and there is a target
directly on our back. Fox News Radio just called Our Revolution “Bernie
Sanders’ Gestapo” and we’re seeing a huge increase in attention from MAGA
mouthpieces like Breitbart aimed at us.

We refuse to be silenced, but we have to act fast and protect our
movement. We’re already investing in encrypted communications, legal
support, emergency security training, and rapid response to keep our staff
and all our activists safe – but our resources are stretched thin and our
fundraising for this month is behind.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34051?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20251214nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9968%2E5885482%2E3p6zKF ]We have always known the far-right would try to shut us down. Can you rush
a donation now to help us protect our volunteers, defend our democracy,
and fight back harder than ever?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34051?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20251214nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9968%2E5885482%2E3p6zKF ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34051?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20251214nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9968%2E5885482%2E3p6zKF ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34051?t=1045&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20251214nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9968%2E5885482%2E3p6zKF ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34051?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20251214nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9968%2E5885482%2E3p6zKF ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34051?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20251214nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9968%2E5885482%2E3p6zKF ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34051?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20251214nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9968%2E5885482%2E3p6zKF ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

The new hit list of organizations could be ANY group that the Trump
administration finds to have "extreme viewpoints on immigration, radical
gender ideology, and anti-American sentiment." And once they have that
list, the memo calls on law enforcement to use Trump’s chilling National
Security directive (NSPM-7) from earlier this year to “root out all
culpable participants — including organizers and funders”.

It’s terrifying – and a clear, written plan to put groups who stand for
immigrant rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and workers’ dignity on a blacklist. They
want to turn every activist willing to speak out into a “suspect.”

That’s not America – that’s authoritarianism. And while they want to
intimidate us, together we can stand up and show them what real courage
looks like.

But the truth is: to prepare we urgently need to increase our cyber
security, grow our legal defense fund, and train our volunteers on how to
stay safe. And every dollar we spend defending ourselves is one less
dollar we can use for grassroots organizing, demonstrations, or supporting
working-class candidates running against the far right.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34051?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20251214nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9968%2E5885482%2E3p6zKF ]When the President of the United States declares all political opponents
his enemies, we have no choice but to defend ourselves. Can you chip in to
help us raise $10,000 today to hit our emergency defense fund goal and
meet this new threat head on?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22227?t=1008&akid=9968%2E5885482%2E3p6zKF ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2025 Movement Builder

name: Breaking:
subject: Court coup — MAGA seizes permanent control of Arkansas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
Overnight, Arkansas just enshrined one party rule. They have lost the last vestiges of their democracy. Full stop.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZZ5LNfxQqFYPTujro_vdH5QjZdgzySp2-D8yjxjnqIGpP6xeP2zFWW8HysXhlPmkL0FIFaF9_rcpIrJblypS_78KIiay63feNTPV1po68tUAjvhCTGuP_JUJb62vwAOARa-U3dKHD3X1TTN0w2zKup-F3m_WsjPpTQqsOcB08i6j6G-c995VO0q5FWIuWjWSFaGlXWke-wgxp8UCg87SOy3Dx-n_YSwn5u_8IwC2L-E=&c=FY70dsctZj9SJ_jk_WMTCfaUS0Anp1iqOQksZw8P2EodVrpAdBQ-HA==&ch=rt9Hk8StSZMBDqB3x22n41Is02ZwbIodqNjyEsT7yFe7OdkJpZB7Ag==)
---
| Peter,
Much like the concerned scientist in the disaster movie whose dire warnings fall on deaf ears --
Defend our Courts has been working desperately for the last seven months to inform the voting public about MAGA's alarming plan to take over critical state courts across America.
Now we've just received a soulcrushing example of what happens when we lose one of these courts to the far-right:
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZZ5LNfxQqFYPTujro_vdH5QjZdgzySp2-D8yjxjnqIGpP6xeP2zFWW8HysXhlPmkL0FIFaF9_rcpIrJblypS_78KIiay63feNTPV1po68tUAjvhCTGuP_JUJb62vwAOARa-U3dKHD3X1TTN0w2zKup-F3m_WsjPpTQqsOcB08i6j6G-c995VO0q5FWIuWjWSFaGlXWke-wgxp8UCg87SO-pKBndgN6VwL0qLzUcaNmE=&c=FY70dsctZj9SJ_jk_WMTCfaUS0Anp1iqOQksZw8P2EodVrpAdBQ-HA==&ch=rt9Hk8StSZMBDqB3x22n41Is02ZwbIodqNjyEsT7yFe7OdkJpZB7Ag==)
---
The Arkansas State Supreme Court just gave the Republican state legislature a green light to kill any constitutional amendment passed by voters.
As the Arkansas Times eloquently puts it:
"Even when Arkansans manage the Herculean task of collecting tens of thousands of signatures and jumping through the myriad hoops Republicans have placed in the path of a constitutional amendment reaching the ballot, the Legislature can simply change or reverse that measure."
If voters were to pass an amendment to loosen Arkansas's near-total ban on abortions, state lawmakers could simply undo it after the fact. Every person in Arkansas could vote to save abortion and it wouldn't matter. Arkansas just lost its democracy. Full stop.
This is what is at stake if MAGA takes your local State Supreme Court. Overnight they can enshrine one party MAGA rule, implement redistricting, and rule that your votes no longer matter as Arkansas' Supreme Court just did.
While it's too late for Arkansas there is time to save courts in Arizona, Michigan, and Georgia where MAGA is working overtime to seize their courts. [Everything is on the line but sadly state courts are a hard issue to get donors to care about. We need your support to protect them. Can you rush a donation of $50, $25, or even $5, to help us defend these key swing state courts?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZZ5LNfxQqFYPTujro_vdH5QjZdgzySp2-D8yjxjnqIGpP6xeP2zFWW8HysXhlPmkECG-ghbR3-kn4jBU8-8Y96t498fMe3Fz3cWxy8L9Fl37OPDW_UTtus8C_0mmIhRx_x20Ux7LVQoBBxyaSpjRyGrzuHl6_Hy1s2L2M-LjtBAKeQuBOUuVSva0OWDK2Neb136r6vmTSmFXgYdexTLIPCQmpb-hlV43EfTw8YrBgKsidB9WhvSuQAvKSP-kEBrg&c=FY70dsctZj9SJ_jk_WMTCfaUS0Anp1iqOQksZw8P2EodVrpAdBQ-HA==&ch=rt9Hk8StSZMBDqB3x22n41Is02ZwbIodqNjyEsT7yFe7OdkJpZB7Ag==)

My heart was sunken all weekend with the news of the mass shooting at Brown University. 2 students were killed and 9 wounded.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/febab51d-617a-45b3-9f16-ba5071720c8a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I went to Brown, graduating in '96\. I went to class in the Barus and Holley Engineering building where the shooting occurred. I, like every student, walked the blocks on Hope Street and Waterman Street too many times to count. I also spent 5 summers on campus as an adult running Venture for America's training camp, which was at Brown largely because of some relationships I had at the school. I was even on campus earlier this year to speak to students.
Were some of those same students among those who were killed or wounded this weekend? That question haunts me.
I texted friends who have children currently at the school. All were accounted for, but their families were of course shaken and horrified. I got a bunch of texts too.
Do you know someone who went to Brown or who goes there now? Chances are pretty high that you do. You know me. It's a quirky school. Smart, creative, benign, somewhat impractical. Idealistic. It's on the top of a hill, aptly named 'College Hill' which it shares with RISD, a design school. Providence is a great place to go to college; it's a small city with a lovely waterfront.
Basically, it's the last place you would imagine a mass shooting.
Thousands of students were sheltering in place on Saturday, fearing for their lives. Many have lost friends. Some families will never see their children again.
Brown was a great place for me to learn how to be a thinking, feeling adult. This generation will now have a totally different association with the school, seared by tragedy and terror. It feels like the loss of innocence.
My heart aches for the students and their families, some of whom will have their frantic calls go unanswered in the most heartbreaking way possible.
The campus of my youth was shot up. Young people I may have high-fived earlier this year might be gone. No one will ever be the same.
Will one or both of my kids walk those same streets and hallways someday?
I grieve for the victims and their families. I mourn for Brown. And I mourn for our country. We feel lost; I hope we find a way forward that protects our children in the way they deserve.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4af98b2d-a583-4bae-8e0f-5d3a2e50d1ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

name: Trisha Calvarese
subject: What’s going on in CO has real potential to turn violent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
Calls for a military raid against a CO prison. Trump has thrown down the gauntlet and is setting off a full blown constitutional crisis.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KCeHPFBjKfbI0JnrYGDHvZ1J-LvjKWDzyE5aN1_ZRP2SZ2zvWImXcajsDBGsqHawGWrJCmUzo14OAcjKTd-79P6_siMg99ytw8hPW_brUtWrv-DuJdKorJGjBRDRoYBniF9ykV-kd6Y7lssJr2P2T3jVclD0S_TYEnIfUkYYcnJjLiETTXmtGexAYM88qHRZ1KThWwBUQ0K2EJtsK3aIkTx8ulhgRXzk&c=x_MdDrenjGmW5XxVhW6QEIRTtmQcx6StNGQCY2Da553yy1q6pTC4bQ==&ch=P_iiWXxj7M1p8mVoDQIBdSj7htr1XOYd_lKaoQReth1F_XQfGfLCtg==)
---
|

Peter,
What's unfolding in Colorado right now has the real potential of turning violent.
Trump just pardoned Tina Peters, a former Mesa Colorado county clerk serving a nine year state sentence for letting unauthorized operatives access voting machines in an attempt to prop up Trump's 2020 election lie.
Presidents do not have the power to pardon state crimes. Trump did it anyway and has thrown down the gauntlet setting off a full blown Constitutional crisis.
Colorado is refusing to comply. And now Peter's lawyers are openly calling for Trump to order a military raid to break her out of state custody. And right at the center of this chaos? Lauren Boebert.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KCeHPFBjKfbI0JnrYGDHvZ1J-LvjKWDzyE5aN1_ZRP2SZ2zvWImXcajsDBGsqHawGWrJCmUzo14OAcjKTd-79P6_siMg99ytw8hPW_brUtWrv-DuJdKorJGjBRDRoYBniF9ykV-kd6Y7lssJr2P2T3jVclD0S_TYEnIfUkYYcnJjLiETTXmtGexAYM88qHRZ1KThWwBUQ0K2EJtsK3aIkQKsjaQQ_RLq&c=x_MdDrenjGmW5XxVhW6QEIRTtmQcx6StNGQCY2Da553yy1q6pTC4bQ==&ch=P_iiWXxj7M1p8mVoDQIBdSj7htr1XOYd_lKaoQReth1F_XQfGfLCtg==)
---
She is leading the charge to free Peters and is pouring gasoline on a situation that has the real potential to spiral into violence.
It gets worse.
MAGA extremist podcaster--Joe Oltmann, a key Boebert ally, resident of her district, and fundraiser for her --has publicly called for the execution of Governor Jared Polis and Attorney General Phil Weiser for not releasing Peters.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KCeHPFBjKfbI0JnrYGDHvZ1J-LvjKWDzyE5aN1_ZRP2SZ2zvWImXcajsDBGsqHawGWrJCmUzo14OAcjKTd-79P6_siMg99ytw8hPW_brUtWrv-DuJdKorJGjBRDRoYBniF9ykV-kd6Y7lssJr2P2T3jVclD0S_TYEnIfUkYYcnJjLiETTXmtGexAYM88qHRZ1KThWwBUQ0K2EJtsK3aIkT4VSCTc8Ex3&c=x_MdDrenjGmW5XxVhW6QEIRTtmQcx6StNGQCY2Da553yy1q6pTC4bQ==&ch=P_iiWXxj7M1p8mVoDQIBdSj7htr1XOYd_lKaoQReth1F_XQfGfLCtg==)
---

This is headed somewhere very dark. When you excuse crimes, undermine elections, and glorify political violence, people get hurt. This is exactly how democracies crack, piece by piece, as extremists like Boebert test how far they can go.
Trisha Calvarese is the Democrat running against Lauren Boebert and in 2024, when our campaign went head to head with her, she had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in the district, outperforming Kamala Harris by 6 points. Trisha is running because Colorado, and this country, cannot survive leaders who cheer on chaos, defend criminals, and flirt with violence to stay in power. We must defeat Boebert and drive this brand of extremism out of office before someone gets killed.
[Will you rush a donation of $25, 10, or whatever you can spare to help us beat Boebert and shut the door on MAGA's violence and lawlessness?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KCeHPFBjKfbI0JnrYGDHvZ1J-LvjKWDzyE5aN1_ZRP2SZ2zvWImXcajsDBGsqHaw4fNwbFoDBFn5xBpwF5oQxPLhXqQSPtWY6iV8dup5mA2LTbu5CFWVZ9BGdDevmip1XkQg2Ny2UuCUM2P02mIDz1jg7YBQ6y6t1A8syEl4MRf1IwNeQ796oubot9FCOUyWy4iObfl03W77GQXTtNFBfzLDTnnQfbQvSIug6KhcgMc=&c=x_MdDrenjGmW5XxVhW6QEIRTtmQcx6StNGQCY2Da553yy1q6pTC4bQ==&ch=P_iiWXxj7M1p8mVoDQIBdSj7htr1XOYd_lKaoQReth1F_XQfGfLCtg==)

name: Ilhan for Congress
subject: Send AIPAC packing
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1988%2E791427%2EOO7Ua3)
Friend, let’s talk about the elephant in the room: **AIPAC.**
Since Ilhan first ran for Congress, putting forward principles of universal human rights and dignity for all, AIPAC has been one of her biggest opponents.
That’s because Ilhan stands against their far-right views on Israel and Palestine and their shameless support for the genocide in Gaza.
And beyond Ilhan, AIPAC has spent the last few election cycles spending **hundreds of millions of dollars** to defeat progressive candidates in Democratic primaries, sometimes successfully.
Now the question remains: Will AIPAC get involved in **_this**_ race, as they have before?
If they do, we can expect millions of dollars of outside spending to flood the Minneapolis airwaves with attack ads.
That’s why our FEC filing deadline at the end of the month is so crucial.
If we file a HUGE fundraising report in support of Ilhan, we can scare AIPAC away. We can show them that defeating Ilhan will be an impossible task and send AIPAC packing.
But the only way that happens is if folks like you chip in whatever you can before the deadline. We need to show that thousands and thousands of people support this grassroots movement and are ready to go up against AIPAC and win.
**[So please: Make a contribution to Ilhan Omar today and help us file a massive fundraising report at the end of the month. AIPAC will be watching, and it’s up to us to send a message of unity and strength.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec25.HnwiDc&refcode=em251214-1-180&t=2&akid=1988%2E791427%2EOO7Ua3)

name: Team Taylor
subject: Good morning 🌅

body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251214-910&t=1&akid=915%2E294397%2EWugEPn)
Good morning, folks. We know it’s early, so we’ll keep this short.
December is nearly halfway over, but we’re only 38% to our monthly fundraising goal.
And with the holidays right around the corner, it’s going to be extra tough to hit our goal. **These next few days are make-or-break for us.**
Every dollar we raise now helps us keep building momentum and ensure we’re able to reach voters across Wisconsin before our opponent’s dark money groups flood the airwaves with attack ads.
[**Can you chip in a few bucks to fuel our campaign? Any bit of support you can offer gets us one step closer to meeting our goal.**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251214_2_ak.DC5VMu&amount=10&refcode=em20251214-910&t=3&akid=915%2E294397%2EWugEPn)

Thank you, and enjoy the rest of your weekend.
Team Taylor

Thank you, and enjoy the rest of your weekend. Team Taylor

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Something Michael Whatley said
body:
I’m ready to fight back.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=161%2E124072%2EVCC_CK)
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2623?t=7&akid=161%2E124072%2EVCC_CK) I heard about something my opponent said the other day, and Peter, all I could do was shake my head. He said, and I quote, “The reason I’m running for this race is because President Trump asked me to run in this race.” Not for our people. Not to make this country better. Not because there are policies or positions he believes in. **I take him at his word:** _Michael Whatley is running for Donald Trump._ **Peter, I’m running because I believe we deserve leaders who run for the people to serve their interests, not any one person’s.** I’m ready to fight to make our communities stronger, keep health care accessible, restore abortion rights, fund our public schools, and more. _But first, I need your help to defeat Whatley so I can get to work for you in Washington._ **[Our team set a $1 million online fundraising goal for this end-of-quarter filing month. I’m asking you to pitch in to help us get halfway there by the end of the day tomorrow, so we can stay on track. Please, pitch in whatever is right for you to invest in our work.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2623?t=8&akid=161%2E124072%2EVCC_CK)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2624?t=9&akid=161%2E124072%2EVCC_CK)

I appreciate it,
Roy Cooper
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2623?t=15&akid=161%2E124072%2EVCC_CK)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=161%2E124072%2EVCC_CK)**

name: Benson HQ
subject: What if…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
We’re counting on our top supporters.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=1134%2E181023%2EJvIU7K)
[**Team, is there anything we can say to convince you to donate $10 in the next 36 hours to help us hit our mid-month fundraising goal, elect Jocelyn as our next governor, and defeat MAGA candidate John James?**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q42025.hprbVa&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20251214_AM1_V1_S1&amount=10&t=2&akid=1134%2E181023%2EJvIU7K)

---
**What if we told you John James voted for the Big Ugly Bill?** The GOP’s signature bill slashed funding for food assistance, Medicare, and Medicaid. Not only that — it eliminated jobs, raised the deficit, AND gave massive tax breaks to the ultra-rich.
**What if we told you that James has _already_ received $5 million from the DeVos family?** That’s just the start. It’s early in the cycle, and they’ve got plenty more where that came from to back his far-right agenda.
**What if we told you that we were outraised last fundraising period?** Falling short again would send a dangerous signal that we’re in a weak place. This could be one of the most expensive governor’s races in the country, and we need to hit our goals to stay competitive.
**What if we told you we're close to hitting our goal, and you can put us over the top?**
[**So we’re asking again: Will you chip in $10 before our deadline to fight back against the Republican big money being poured into this race, defeat John James, and keep Trump’s extreme agenda out of Michigan? >>**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q42025.hprbVa&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20251214_AM1_V1_S1&amount=10&t=4&akid=1134%2E181023%2EJvIU7K)

name: The Democratic Party
subject: This is NOT an email about Republicans
body:
---
Derek, Is there _anything_ we can say to get you to [**contribute to the DNC today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?refcode=em_20251214_5537_fr&amount=7&refcode2=5537_22930333_2uQ5hl&akid=5537%2E22930333%2E2uQ5hl) **What if we shared a few reasons to have _hope_?** Recent polling shows voters largely favoring Democratic candidates on the 2026 midterm ballot. That means realistically, **Democrats have a good chance of flipping the House and the Senate and winning back control of Congress next year.** When Democrats won races in New Jersey, Virginia, Pennsylvania, and elsewhere this year, voters sent a message: that people all over the country are fed up with Trump and his allies’ agenda. Even after Election Day, voters have continued to make their stance clear. Democrat Aftyn Behn _significantly_ overperformed in TN-07, a district that Trump won by 22 points in 2024. And Eileen Higgins just won her race to become Miami’s next mayor, becoming the first Democratic-aligned candidate to win Miami’s mayoral seat in nearly 30 years. **With 2026 directly on the horizon, we’re not letting this momentum fade.** At the DNC, we’re using these bits of hope to fuel our fight to retake Congress and elect Democrats in down-ballot races who will check Trump’s power in their cities, districts, and states. We’re continuing to make historic investments in Democratic state parties, and we’re preparing to scale up our voter outreach efforts next year. **That work is already underway, but we need a surge of Democratic supporters to continue and expand it. And you might be surprised to hear this, but a LOT of our donations come from emails just like this one.** [**So we’re asking: Will you join the thousands of grassroots donors who are already pitching in to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?refcode=em_20251214_5537_fr&amount=7&refcode2=5537_22930333_2uQ5hl&akid=5537%2E22930333%2E2uQ5hl) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251214_5537_fr&refcode2=5537_22930333_2uQ5hl&akid=5537%2E22930333%2E2uQ5hl)**
---

---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_20251214_5537_fr&refcode2=5537_22930333_2uQ5hl&akid=5537%2E22930333%2E2uQ5hl)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_20251214_5537_fr&refcode2=5537_22930333_2uQ5hl&akid=5537%2E22930333%2E2uQ5hl)**

****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em_20251214_5537_fr&refcode2=5537_22930333_2uQ5hl&akid=5537%2E22930333%2E2uQ5hl)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?refcode=em_20251214_5537_fr&refcode2=5537_22930333_2uQ5hl&akid=5537%2E22930333%2E2uQ5hl)**

Thank you,
The Democrats

name: Local Democracy Project
subject: Write to your State Leaders and Pass the Fossil-Free Insurers Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Local Democracy Project
body:
| | |
Across the country, homeowners are paying more for less insurance coverage as climate disasters grow more and more severe. In the last few years, property insurance premiums rose **24 percent**. For too long, insurers have operated in the shadows, quietly investing in fossil fuel expansion while blaming climate change for pulling out of vulnerable communities. _This cycle leaves families unprotected while corporations profit._ **The Fossil-Free Insurers Act is the only state legislation that breaks that cycle.** It requires major insurers to phase out fossil fuel investments and underwriting by 2035, imposes penalties for companies that fail to comply, and directs funds toward clean energy and climate resilience for disadvantaged communities. clean_body: | | | Across the country, homeowners are paying more for less insurance coverage as climate disasters grow more and more severe. In the last few years, property insurance premiums rose 24 percent. For too long, insurers have operated in the shadows, quietly investing in fossil fuel expansion while blaming climate change for pulling out of vulnerable communities. This cycle leaves families unprotected while corporations profit. The Fossil-Free Insurers Act is the only state legislation that breaks that cycle. It requires major insurers to phase out fossil fuel investments and underwriting by 2035, imposes penalties for companies that fail to comply, and directs funds toward clean energy and climate resilience for disadvantaged communities. This is the only way we hold insurers accountable and protect the people they serve. The Fossil-Free Insurers Act makes transparency, accountability, and climate responsibility a condition of doing business in our state. By passing this legislation, lawmakers can ensure that every insurer operating here aligns its investments with science-based climate goals, discloses its fossil fuel ties, and prioritizes people over polluters. Thank you for defending democracy, The Local Democracy Project Team supports down-ballot races and empowering communities across the country. We’re rebuilding democracy from the ground up. To donate by check, please mail to: Local Democracy Project PO Box 720800 Pinion Hills, CA 92372 Paid for by Local Democracy Project. Contributions or gifts to Local Democracy Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . name: Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: lowering our ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Here’s the truth: Our fundraising has slowed down dramatically in the last month. We don’t mean to alarm you, but as Republicans look for any sign of weakness in Jon Ossoff and this campaign, it’s important that we get back on track — _and quickly_.

**So, that’s why we’re lowering our ask to $2.** _Nope, that’s not a typo. Just $2_.

If you can pitch in a buck (or more!) to Jon’s campaign and Maggie Hassan today to help us get back on track and show the strength of this team, you can chip in to this link: [**_https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_q42025_jon-ossoff-split_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121264813/588887054/32293070?amount=2&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.14_Jon-Ossoff-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzRhNWUwYi0wOGQ5LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-IsA23l8XysEPwWy00d-U7NMjTrVBK_gx2bDsFrRLFs=)

Otherwise, here’s why your donation is so important, especially today:

Jon is the most vulnerable Senator up for reelection and is facing the full force of the GOP’s war chest next November.

We understand that $2 might not sound like much, especially compared to the hundreds of millions Republicans are going to spend to flip Jon’s seat red.

But five years ago, this incredible grassroots team made history by winning a runoff election and securing the Senate majority — and it was all thanks to $2, $20, and $25 donations from supporters just like you.

But Jon is facing his toughest race yet. Winning will require building the largest statewide campaign Georgia has ever seen. And to run a campaign of this size, we can’t risk falling short on our fundraising goals.

[**_So we’re humbly asking you today: Can you chip in $2 — or whatever feels right to you — to Maggie Hassan and Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign? clean_body: Here’s the truth: Our fundraising has slowed down dramatically in the last month. We don’t mean to alarm you, but as Republicans look for any sign of weakness in Jon Ossoff and this campaign, it’s important that we get back on track — and quickly. So, that’s why we’re lowering our ask to $2. Nope, that’s not a typo. Just $2. If you can pitch in a buck (or more!) to Jon’s campaign and Maggie Hassan today to help us get back on track and show the strength of this team, you can chip in to this link: = Otherwise, here’s why your donation is so important, especially today: Jon is the most vulnerable Senator up for reelection and is facing the full force of the GOP’s war chest next November. We understand that $2 might not sound like much, especially compared to the hundreds of millions Republicans are going to spend to flip Jon’s seat red. But five years ago, this incredible grassroots team made history by winning a runoff election and securing the Senate majority — and it was all thanks to $2, $20, and $25 donations from supporters just like you. But Jon is facing his toughest race yet. Winning will require building the largest statewide campaign Georgia has ever seen. And to run a campaign of this size, we can’t risk falling short on our fundraising goals. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Jon Ossoff and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for standing with Jon. name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Brown University
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Team -
Once again, my heart breaks that another school has to experience the pain and tragedy of gun violence.
Last night, a gunman opened fire at Brown University in Providence, Rhode Island — killing 2 students and injuring at least 9 others. As details continue to emerge, I’m grateful for the first responders on the scene and pray for the victims, survivors, and their families.
This shooting comes on the second day of final exams. Students should only have to worry about studying — not hiding from gunfire.
Guns are the leading cause of death for young people in America. More than car crashes and cancer. Gun violence is a crisis and we cannot ignore it.
Americans are tired of waiting around for our leaders in Washington to decide that our children's lives matter. We must use every tool at our disposal to take on the gun lobby and keep our communities safe.
At GIFFORDS, we will continue fighting for change and will not rest until we have a future free from gun violence.
One life lost to preventable gun violence is one too many. We must act.
Sincerely,
Gabby Giffords

**Please take a second to read this...**
Gabby Giffords has led the fight against the gun lobby for more than a decade, but she can't do it alone.
If everyone reading this donated just $17, we'd have the resources to take on the gun lobby in Congress and states across the country. But not everyone gives — making it even more important for people who care and understand the stakes of our struggle to pitch in what they can.
If $17 seems worth it to you to change our gun laws in order to make our communities safer from gun violence, we're asking you to contribute to GIFFORDS PAC today.
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/61660?c0=giffords-em-q42025.9aQs58&refcode=em251214-1-b&t=1&akid=11114%2E3935704%2E-Hpr_u)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=11114%2E3935704%2E-Hpr_u) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Berrett Gall
subject: This guy is back for some reason
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
Not the Rudolph you were hoping to hear about this December.
# [](https://act.timwalz.com/go/195?refcode=em20251214-284&t=1&akid=284%2E34582%2EtXuaVA)
Peter,
[](https://act.timwalz.com/go/211?t=2&akid=284%2E34582%2EtXuaVA)
I’m sorry, but he’s back in the news — this time right here in Minnesota.
Rudy Giuliani is advising Mike Lindell in his campaign for Governor of Minnesota. You can’t make this stuff up.
As a Senior Advisor to Governor Walz, I know firsthand how important it is to have a team that leads with steady hands and provides the best advice possible at all times.
**That’s not Rudy Giuliani.**
Giuliani has been one of Trump’s most loyal henchmen and has gone completely off the rails with his conspiracy theories that got him convicted in relation to the 2020 election. I guess it makes sense why he’s working with Mike Lindell.
**[To stop these conspiracy theorists and protect Minnesota, will you chip in $5 to make sure we can re-elect Governor Walz and defeat Mike Lindell and Rudy Giuliani?](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251214._KSgff&amount=5&refcode=em20251214-284&t=3&akid=284%2E34582%2EtXuaVA)**

body:
The Supreme Court has agreed to hear Trump’s birthright citizenship case. | |
---
Peter, **The Supreme Court has officially decided to hear Trump’s case against birthright citizenship.** [****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38jvf5GaclcQ7i_R9B-DMhJnuXoieTmwfkxDj_77X5VQzj7EI9YPAeI76GCMSq83_GgxGru_UyxhyVbqXHTTrd8KDHhWQL-NkpN3az_3p3vjbObFUHUKBxeJhXJHrc7dDzWS8GG2y27Vh18N9n4BDUYc1P2ytUq_Ythn-y7ljkVUvES5JmtrvR7LZhaQgPpZ9z0grr7AX9mfmAQi0tDD5CRQWvrt0C-Rk1s8MJMTgMY26AM4Km_JtcPMHasaY4wf3kO-8oGhn1QBsqWzzFbLTxcYmIm3gqNAFOI-DOQKGY7ZAuN8WbZqG0UhwKH35scTNCCYnyQSsAp5Jyeq-TjY56gcG3um7l_n-Vznhao2zzgsQz4VrAOGUtZ6DTmrEaNFU2te1JNnpoJJDgnF9bc5snF/4mf/PpnRCloCSxCsT-W15xisEA/h0/h001.mR_6Lhs1Z_CKt1gH_MgHL3QXBLClqnNy7HjowNIY9V0) Since his first day retaking office, Trump has tried to attack and tear down birthright citizenship—the constitutional guarantee that if you’re born on American soil, you’re an American citizen. **His administration essentially wants the right to kick children and babies out of America if they were born to non-citizens.** His plan would demand parents’ paperwork in the hospital, and assign the baby their mom and dad’s legal status. Four federal district courts and two appeals courts have blocked his plan. But earlier this year, the Supreme Court stepped in to limit the ability of lower courts to stop the attacks on birthright citizenship. **Now, the Court could tear down 127 years of precedent when they take up the case next term.** **[If the Supreme Court won’t defend our rights, Congress must. Demand Congress pass comprehensive legislation that affirms the right to birthright citizenship immediately >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38jvf5GaclcQ7i_R9B-DMhJnuXoieTmwfkxDj_77X5VQzj7EI9YPAeI76GCMSq83_GgxGru_UyxhyVbqXHTTrd8KDHhWQL-NkpN3az_3p3vjbObFUHUKBxeJhXJHrc7dDzWS8GG2y27Vh18N9n4BDUYc1P2ytUq_Ythn-y7ljkVUs05DQUDfSHpkrSWe-HufgNV64XnGNwABqiqsVywy3v6fkOZ3PT6V9O0Ls-BUcQfARxUzkw1QFc9yloj-nuPZEMeRJwlOQTgWKDVsFhEfYsbfJD5guUIDhcnXIfZHUBCsuydccEokT125pvvOB2EmuTuVH73vl7iXD2XhC7vJHfCdDRTJzJf6GFgXG_0BpOn4aeaaCMzirtNc3CfDiXh_CyCUvnBn8LOi3wkhw6CUIbI/4mf/PpnRCloCSxCsT-W15xisEA/h1/h001._7FXBsD24zbdwBI7kPB70R4iMt9AaqIdeWZ1KJkoLlk)** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38jvf5GaclcQ7i_R9B-DMhJnuXoieTmwfkxDj_77X5VQzj7EI9YPAeI76GCMSq83_GgxGru_UyxhyVbqXHTTrd8KDHhWQL-NkpN3az_3p3vjbObFUHUKBxeJhXJHrc7dDzWS8GG2y27Vh18N9n4BDUYc1P2ytUq_Ythn-y7ljkVUiMNzaF3Ie6LiY1bnCKZocxRsqk38J85Bk17ujwJT1zzkV-6q-MY7w-egJZLTYUm2peA7gdP7deYmbucjFNIzk8ECrHv0NG5xpHmloGabOy9L0WexaAgBG5KCefaU168EOHTHdnZX9inbfmC_ryAk0NIspx00DtgcuDxkGA7XovtxZ0VFJdGl39zvVnmMaqHA_HfdzHmiRra_-_F5VCjpcEJtHOlZuFXvVmUZvP50oPG/4mf/PpnRCloCSxCsT-W15xisEA/h2/h001.fhODSUt3oWea6vUKWzIzjuF4dE3j0N3DejrRkssnVvE) **** In a democracy, a wannabe dictator doesn’t get to decide who counts as an American. But that’s exactly what Trump is trying to do. **His plan violates both the 14th Amendment and legal precedent that’s been locked in since 1898—but he knows he has a sympathetic ear with the MAGA justices on the Supreme Court.** That’s why he went running straight to them after the lower courts tried to stop him. This should be an open-and-shut case, but we know we can’t depend on the MAGA justices to do the right thing. That’s why we’re driving thousands of petition signatures demanding Congress protect the right to birthright citizenship. **[Demand your representative and senators curb Trump’s authoritarian attacks on our rights. Tell them to pass legislation defending birthright citizenship now!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38jvf5GaclcQ7i_R9B-DMhJnuXoieTmwfkxDj_77X5VQzj7EI9YPAeI76GCMSq83_GgxGru_UyxhyVbqXHTTrd8KDHhWQL-NkpN3az_3p3vjbObFUHUKBxeJhXJHrc7dDzWS8GG2y27Vh18N9n4BDUYc1P2ytUq_Ythn-y7ljkVUsg5bPUMs3ebZq-zNd_gPKtSSIkqAV3fuGsyyx8Tl5KBQEKkO0sDrmDb1pJ553XaP1VEj6RuAqDQSZeKVzP2yN1bAigN3tsN4wSAD4sihS-quZFt3l1V3AIeE2oNU-PaEiy4KH8N3APAVISOK5lM6pj-IIUzbw2kYOQ9EbiiYMNmXQwha-7GCQzm-mtWPtmotb_E1XVDQEK3LKR1eqpooe0QSsxv3i_cjPMSFNPRECQL/4mf/PpnRCloCSxCsT-W15xisEA/h3/h001.hfsH8MKsidMOGbA_vdRhttEEmd9MZS6wg3ys1M_gcYo)** Thank you for supporting the fight for birthright citizenship, Morgan Stahr

Every year around my birthday, I can’t help but reflect on how I want to live whatever time I have left. On my 82nd birthday, that reflection happened in a jail cell because I refused to stay quiet about the climate crisis — which was not, I’ll admit, part of the plan. **So for my 88th? My team is hosting a virtual celebration to roast me. A little embarrassment, a lot of love, and a few friends who’ve known me long enough to tell stories I probably shouldn’t let them share.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121265738/588889247/1820297183?refcode=ea.171d1228-0bd9-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.171d1228-0bd9-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE3MWQxMjI4LTBiZDktZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZfTLw54Y7tPzEm2JN1NbE05aXe20cJxp_bzPXOrYDk0=) **[Join me and a few of my feisty, *former* friends like Ted Danson on December 17 at 5:00 PM PT / 8:00 PM ET for a night I guess I won’t be able to forget... even if I want to. I hope to see you there!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121265739/588889250/1820297183?refcode=ea.171d1228-0bd9-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.171d1228-0bd9-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE3MWQxMjI4LTBiZDktZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZfTLw54Y7tPzEm2JN1NbE05aXe20cJxp_bzPXOrYDk0=)** | [**🎟️ Reserve your ticket now →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121265740/588889251/1820297183?refcode=ea.171d1228-0bd9-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.171d1228-0bd9-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE3MWQxMjI4LTBiZDktZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZfTLw54Y7tPzEm2JN1NbE05aXe20cJxp_bzPXOrYDk0=)

clean_body: I’m so looking forward to an evening of laughter and recommitting, alongside you. | Every year around my birthday, I can’t help but reflect on how I want to live whatever time I have left. On my 82nd birthday, that reflection happened in a jail cell because I refused to stay quiet about the climate crisis — which was not, I’ll admit, part of the plan. So for my 88th? My team is hosting a virtual celebration to roast me. A little embarrassment, a lot of love, and a few friends who’ve known me long enough to tell stories I probably shouldn’t let them share. = = | = Every ticket from this celebration helps fund our work to elect climate champions and flip the House in 2026. And as a special thank-you, all ticket holders will receive the recipe for one of my favorite holiday cocktails (or mocktails!) to toast with. We have a big year ahead. Big challenges, big opportunities, and big moments to rise to. I believe with everything in me that when people come together — in celebration and in purpose — we can outmatch the fossil fuel industry’s influence. = In solidarity, Jane = P.S. Already got your ticket? Thank you so much! Our records can take a little time to update. We’re excited to celebrate with you next week. | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Send donations via check to: Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

subject: If they can silence voices, what else can they erase?
body:

| | | [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
| | **It’s Candace Owens.**
---
**When my friend was recently assassinated, the cruelty spoke volumes.**
---
Instead of mourning, elites mocked. **Some even celebrated.
** _That’s not free speech._ That’s erasing a voice. By force. **By death.**
---
**And the hypocrisy doesn’t stop there.**
---
| | [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
**Jimmy Kimmel laughed when Roseanne Barr lost her career.**
---
**He cheered when Tucker Carlson was taken off the air.** But when HE was fired, suddenly it was about “free speech.”
---
**We all know the rules. If you are on the “approved” side, you’re protected. If you’re not, you’re silenced. Or worse..**.
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
| | **Google recently admitted that the Biden administration pressured them to take down YouTube content that didn’t even break the rules.**
---
They called that pressure “unacceptable and wrong.” The only reason they are admitting it now is because President Trump will not **put up with their nonsense.

** Banks have **openly canceled conservatives.** Melania Trump. Kanye West. If they can target public figures, what chance does the **average person** have?
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
**So here’s the truth...**
---
If they can pressure platforms to **censor** , if banks can **cancel accounts** , if the IRS can **weaponize audits** , what makes YOU think your savings are _safe in their hands?_
---
**Based on what we have seen recently, we are at a turning point.**
---
Institutions are showing _they will not hesitate_ to use their power.

**I may be targeted next. Or it could be you...**
---
| | **So I will _never_ trust my family’s future to people who have _already_ shown they will use any tactic, no matter how dirty.**
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
That is why I keep part of my savings in GOLD and SILVER.
---
Assets that _cannot_ be censored, deleted, frozen, or murdered.
---
**If freedom still matters to you, protect your voice and protect what you’ve earned!**

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Good morning
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
You might not know this, but the vast majority of the donations we receive come from emails like this one, and from supporters like you. They don’t come from massive checks, and I don’t take any corporate PAC money.
#

Good morning, my friend.
You’ve probably noticed I’m reaching out a bit more than usual lately, and I hope that’s alright.
You might not know this, but the vast majority of the donations we receive come from emails like this one, and from supporters like you. They don’t come from massive checks, and I don’t take any corporate PAC money. In fact, our average donation online over the last month or so is between $26 and $27. I’m really proud that this is a truly grassroots campaign, and I hope you are, too.
So, when I’m reaching out like this, I hope you see it as less of an annoyance and more an example of just how important you are to my team.
I know you can’t chip in to every single email we send — that’d be nuts. But when the time is right, it means a lot when folks take that step.
That’s how I keep up the fight against Trump, and over the last month it’s how I’ve been able to put together a strategy and response to everything he’s thrown at me.
We’re not out of the woods yet, though. And tomorrow we hit an important milestone on the path to our final FEC deadline of the year.
[**So, before then, I’m hoping you can make a donation to help us stay on track to our goals — but only if you can afford to do so.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-dec25-dod/.FHtwNx&refcode=em251214-1-1mil&t=1&akid=6293%2E6688874%2EpeZg4S)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1396?c0=mek-em-dec25-dod/.F_hIMP&refcode=em251214-1-1mil&t=20&akid=6293%2E6688874%2EpeZg4S)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1397?c0=mek-em-dec25-dod/.x-uxze&refcode=em251214-1-1mil&t=21&akid=6293%2E6688874%2EpeZg4S)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1390?c0=mek-em-dec25-dod/.RiF5s9&refcode=em251214-1-1mil&t=22&akid=6293%2E6688874%2EpeZg4S)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1391?c0=mek-em-dec25-dod/.CJLCi0&refcode=em251214-1-1mil&t=23&akid=6293%2E6688874%2EpeZg4S)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1392?c0=mek-em-dec25-dod/.-YNXpy&refcode=em251214-1-1mil&t=24&akid=6293%2E6688874%2EpeZg4S)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1395?c0=mek-em-dec25-dod/.9Ua3bC&refcode=em251214-1-1mil&t=25&akid=6293%2E6688874%2EpeZg4S)**
---
****
Thank you,
Mark

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: emailing you with real urgency
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RAJA FOR ILLINOIS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_raja_fr_senate-footer_q22025?amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_raja_fr_senate-footer_q22025?amount=5]

Peter – I’m emailing you today with real urgency.

December has been a tough month for fundraising, and the timing couldn’t be worse.

At the end of this month, we’re facing a FEC Reporting Deadline – meaning our fundraising numbers go PUBLIC for all to see.

And with less than 100 days until our election, everyone from the media to Donald Trump to MAGA Super PACs will be watching to see exactly how much we’ve raised.

If we fall short, national Republicans and special interest groups will see an opening — and they could come after us HARD.

That’s why I’ve set a $35,000 mid-month fundraising goal to fight back. It’s ambitious, but it's absolutely necessary.

This is our FINAL benchmark before our numbers go public, so I’ll be making a major push to get us back on track in these final 48 hours.

That means I’ll have to send a lot of emails in the next two days. I’m sorry about that — BUT if you lock in your mid-month donation right now, I promise not to email you again.

The 2026 Senate elections will be some of the most competitive and expensive in history. That means every grassroots donation has the power to decide the outcome, Peter. So please, will you rush a donation right now to hit our 48-hour goal and flip the Senate? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_raja_fr_em_q42025?amount=25&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250]

MID-MONTH FUNDRAISING CAMPAIGN
DEADLINE: 12/15, 11:59 pm — less than 48 hours remaining!
GOAL: $35,000
Supporter Name: PeterMID-MONTH CONTRIBUTION: PENDING
DONATE NOW → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_raja_fr_em_q42025?amount=25&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250]

Thank you for your support,

Raja Krishnamoorthi

But Republicans will spend MILLIONS to flip this seat red.
We need every single person reading this email to do their part to fight back against Trump and Flip the Senate Majority BLUE.

name: Squad Victory HQ
subject: Powering the movement we’re building today, not tomorrow
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251214-1716-foote&t=1001&akid=1716%2E342411%2E1cE8rJ ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

We’ve got four critical seats to defend in 2026 — and the sooner we act,
the stronger we are.

Waiting until September or October of 2026 might feel natural, but here’s
the truth: every dollar you give now does more. It powers the movement
we’re building today, not tomorrow. That means we can:

* Organize communities before election season. The earlier we engage,
the more prepared people are to turn out when it counts.
* Plan strategically and deploy resources efficiently. Early funding
lets us fight where it matters most, not just where it’s convenient.
* Protect Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida’s seats. Every day we
wait is a day opponents can gain ground — but every dollar we raise
now makes it harder for them to succeed.

The Squad Victory Fund isn’t about playing it safe. It’s about building a
movement that refuses to back down. We fight for our communities, our
values, and our future. And your early support is what gives us the power
to win.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251214-movement.2x9jYI&refcode=em20251214-1716&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1716%2E342411%2E1cE8rJ ]So, Peter,
will you chip in $3 to the Squad Victory Fund? Turn what
you’d give next year into action that strengthens our movement today.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251214-movement.2x9jYI&refcode=em20251214-1716&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1716%2E342411%2E1cE8rJ ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

Squad Victory HQ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1716%2E342411%2E1cE8rJ

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com
clean_body: [ ]Squad Victory Fund Peter, We’ve got four critical seats to defend in 2026 — and the sooner we act, the stronger we are. Waiting until September or October of 2026 might feel natural, but here’s the truth: every dollar you give now does more. It powers the movement we’re building today, not tomorrow. That means we can: Organize communities before election season. The earlier we engage, the more prepared people are to turn out when it counts. Plan strategically and deploy resources efficiently. Early funding lets us fight where it matters most, not just where it’s convenient. * Protect Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida’s seats. Every day we wait is a day opponents can gain ground — but every dollar we raise now makes it harder for them to succeed. The Squad Victory Fund isn’t about playing it safe. It’s about building a movement that refuses to back down. We fight for our communities, our values, and our future. And your early support is what gives us the power to win. [ ]So, Peter, will you chip in $3 to the Squad Victory Fund? Turn what you’d give next year into action that strengthens our movement today. [ ]Contribute ›› In solidarity, Squad Victory HQ

name: Deb Haaland
subject: three reasons why I urgently need your support:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
| | |
---
Hi friend, I know you’re busy, so I’ll keep this quick:

My team and I have set an ambitious **$30,000 mid-month fundraising goal** to help us stay on track to win in New Mexico and keep our state blue. _**[Will you chip in $5 right now to help fuel my campaign for governor?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1855?t=1&akid=6215%2E400544%2Eo4WKIP)**_
| | [Donate](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1855?t=2&akid=6215%2E400544%2Eo4WKIP)
---
Here are three reasons why you should chip in to my campaign today:

1\. As a 35th-generation New Mexican and a proud member of Laguna Pueblo, **I am both of and for New Mexico**. I lived the realities and struggles so many New Mexican families face: raised my child as a single mother while relying on food stamps, built my own small business to make ends meet, worked in my child's preschool to bring down the cost of tuition.

2\. My own journey is what motivated me to step into service. **I** **became one of the first Native American women ever elected to Congress** and served as the **first Native American Cabinet Secretary** in U.S. history. I fought for working families, public lands and rural communities every step of the way.

3\. **Now, I'm running for governor because New Mexicans deserve better. It’s time for our children to learn to read earlier. New Mexicans deserve to see a doctor without long wait times. Groceries and homeownership should be within reach for every family. And in every community, people should feel safe right where they live.**
**But this race is already shaping up to be one of the most competitive races in the country — and national Republicans are _doubling down_ on their attacks against me, going as far as spreading misinformation to distract voters.**
**I'm ready to fight for stability, dignity and opportunity for every family in our state. But I can't do it alone, friend. That's why it's critical for me to reach my $30,000 mid-month goal, and why I'm asking for your support today:**
_
[Please, will you rush $5 now to help me become the next governor of New Mexico and deliver progress for working families?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1855?t=3&akid=6215%2E400544%2Eo4WKIP)_
| | [Donate](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1855?t=4&akid=6215%2E400544%2Eo4WKIP)
---
Thank you,

Deb
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1855?t=5&akid=6215%2E400544%2Eo4WKIP)
|
* * *
| | [Donate >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1846?t=6&akid=6215%2E400544%2Eo4WKIP)
---
| | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1102?t=7&akid=6215%2E400544%2Eo4WKIP)
---

[**Receive Fewer Emails**](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?&t=8&akid=6215%2E400544%2Eo4WKIP)
[**Update Your Information**](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/?&t=9&akid=6215%2E400544%2Eo4WKIP)
[**Unsubscribe**](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?&t=10&akid=6215%2E400544%2Eo4WKIP)
Email us: info@debhaaland.com

name: Dominic Rapini
subject: Peter Lumaj - Connecticut's Choice for Secretary of the State
body:
An accomplished Immigrant who appreciates what real Democracy looks like

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/88696b9ec9fd/when-we-vote-we-win-14766465?e=8763c56857)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | **“A nation can survive disagreements, but it cannot survive doubt in its elections. When citizens trust the ballot, freedom endures. When they don’t, everything else begins to unravel.” - Dominic Rapini**
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| [Donate to Peter](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=946ea5b397&e=8763c56857)
---
| |
**My Endorsement of Peter Lumaj for Connecticut Secretary of the State**
_By Dominic Rapini - American Businessman, Political Commentator, and proud American of Italian Descent_

**I want to speak today about a man I’m proud to call a friend, and even prouder to endorse. His name is Peter Lumaj.**
Peter Lumaj’s story is not just an American story. It is the American story.
He was not born into freedom.**He fled tyranny to find it. Raised under a brutal communist regime in Albania, Peter learned early what happens when government controls speech, faith, and the ballot box.** His family practiced their religion in secret, knowing that discovery could mean prison or worse. That kind of upbringing does something to a man. It teaches him that liberty is not a slogan. It is a responsibility worth defending .
When Peter came to America, he did what generations of immigrants have done before him. He worked. He studied. He learned the language of freedom and the law. He became a lawyer, trained in political science and law on both sides of the Atlantic, and he went on to serve as a fraud investigator, fighting corruption and standing up for fairness under the law .
Today, Peter Lumaj is a family man, a successful attorney, a real estate developer, and a proud resident of Fairfield, Connecticut. But more than that, he is a man who understands something many career politicians never will: what it means to lose freedom, and what it takes to protect it.
**That is why Peter Lumaj is uniquely qualified to serve as Secretary of the State of Connecticut.**
This office is not ceremonial. It is the guardian of our elections and the steward of our statewide business processes. It demands integrity, legal judgment, and moral clarity. Peter has all three. He understands that democracy only works when elections are fair, transparent, and trusted. He understands that the rule of law must apply equally to everyone, without fear or favor.
Peter is not new to this fight. In 2014, he was the Republican nominee for Secretary of the State and ran one of the closest statewide races in recent history, winning multiple congressional districts and earning the trust of voters across Connecticut . He has spent decades supporting candidates, knocking on doors, and standing shoulder to shoulder with those who believe this state deserves better.
I’ll tell you something honestly**. I might almost regret not running for this office myself. But any regret disappears when I know a man like Peter Lumaj is stepping forward to carry this mantle.**
So today, I ask my friends, my supporters, and yes, even my detractors, to rally behind Peter Lumaj. Help him meet the financial goals he’ll need to fight this campaign. Spread the word. Shine a light into the darker corners of our state government and demand better.
Peter Lumaj is a warrior for election integrity. He is a defender of the rule of law. And he is living proof that America still rewards faith, hard work, and courage.
**I wholeheartedly endorse Peter Lumaj for Secretary of the State of Connecticut.** Let’s get Peter on the ticket. Let’s put him in the fight. And let’s remind Connecticut what freedom looks like when it’s protected by someone who knows its true value.

---
|
---
|
---

Dominic For CT 4 Mariners Way Branford, CT 06405-4481 USA

body:
# [](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43706?t=1&akid=240536%2E444211%2EakzsRj)
Tomorrow marks our mid-month fundraising deadline, and what we raise now will determine how strong we start 2026. Meeting every goal is crucial if we want to turn opportunities into victories across Texas.
**Right now, Democrats have a real chance to flip seats and build momentum up and down the ballot** —but only if we have the resources to organize, mobilize, and fight. These opportunities won’t wait for us, and we can’t afford to miss them.
Take Senate District 9 as a perfect example. Democrat Taylor Rehmet—a union leader, veteran, and lifelong Texan—has forced a competitive runoff in a district Trump won by more than _17 points_ last year. Taylor grew up in this district, lives the values of hard work and community, and knows the issues that matter to everyday Texans. Last month, he finished ahead of two Republicans with _48% of the vote_ , proving that voters are ready for leaders who actually represent them.
_This isn’t just one bright spot._ It’s one of many opportunities across Texas where Democrats can fight back and win. But victories like this don’t happen on their own. They require a strong, organized effort and the resources to match. Every dollar we raise now ensures we can support candidates like Taylor, reach voters, register new ones, and turn promising opportunities into real wins.
**But we can only seize these opportunities if we hit our fundraising goals and keep building the momentum we need.**
[**Can you chip in $3 ahead of tomorrow’s mid-month deadline to ensure we meet our goal, continue organizing across the state, and lift candidates to victory come 2026?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251214.a92fGq&refcode=ema20251214-240536&t=3&akid=240536%2E444211%2EakzsRj)

Friend,
---
On 11/21, the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona had the chance to do the right thing and DROP her wrongful prosecution against me – an _innocent_ 80-year-old man facing 20 years in prison.
---
_But at the _final_ _hour__ , she chose bloodthirsty **VENGEANCE** over **JUSTICE** , and decided to continue her prosecution against me and put me on _TRIAL_ right after the holidays are over.
---
**She is now rushing to the __State__ Supreme Court for emergency assistance.**
---
It’s all viciously calculated. She knows the President has no pardon authority for __state__ crimes.
---
But let me be clear: **I will never give up the fight for my freedom**.
---
When President Trump and I were arrested in the most violent jail in America, we proclaimed, “ _NEVER_ SURRENDER!”
---
Two years later, President Trump is back in the White House.
---
_**But I’m still fighting for my freedom!** And Democrats have RIGGED the case so that a federal pardon from President Trump is **_POWERLESS_** in _state_ court._

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Pete Hegseth should resign. Add your name 🖊️

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?amount=25]
Pete Hegseth is not fit to serve, and he should resign.
If that’s all you need to hear, add your name to my petition today to call for Hegseth’s resignation. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/cGL9IAjZVUuKFJX6wU2qJA2]
But there’s a whole lot more to say about this.
Look, the writing was on the wall with this guy from the very beginning. He barely scraped through his confirmation process (even Mitch McConnell voted against him, and they had to call in JD Vance to break the 50-50 tie). He has a very concerning history — former coworkers have said that he’d shown up for work drunk, and there are several deeply troubling reports of sexual harassment and assault, including a 2017 incident in which he entered into a private settlement agreement with the accuser.
And since he’s been Secretary of Defense — or to use his preferred name that he feels better reflects his identity, Secretary of War — things have gotten much, much worse.
Hegseth endangered American troops by being reckless with sensitive operational details on the unclassified messaging app Signal. Even the Pentagon’s independent watchdog officially determined that he violated protocol and put U.S. objectives and troops in danger.
That should be the end of it.
Yes, he abused taxpayer funds by asking for his own makeup studio in the Pentagon. Yes, he enacted a cruel and unnecessary transgender military ban — punishing brave servicemembers for being who they are and worsening our readiness. Yes, he lifted up the twisted ideas of his pastor who thinks women shouldn’t vote and homosexuality should be criminalized.
But through all of that, the bottom line is: Pete Hegseth abjectly failed at one of the most basic principles of his job. He put the courageous people who serve our country in danger. And he is unfit to serve as Secretary of Defense.
Add your name if you agree: Pete Hegseth must resign. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/cGL9IAjZVUuKFJX6wU2qJA2]
SIGN THE PETITION [https://secure.ngpvan.com/cGL9IAjZVUuKFJX6wU2qJA2]
Thank you for speaking out with me.
—Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?amount=25]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

_Our records aren't perfect — if you've donated with another email address or by check that may not be reflected here. But Leaders We Deserve still greatly appreciates all of your support for our mission of electing new leaders!_
Here’s the truth: **Leaders We Deserve has already made a major impact in 2025, electing exciting leaders like Akbar Ali, now the youngest state legislator in Georgia.** But we aren’t finished — we’ve got even bigger plans for the midterms.
We can elect bold young progressives all across the country next year, but we need this grassroots team to keep powering our momentum in these fights.
**[We can’t do this without you, Peter. Will you make your first donation today to help us meet our $22,200 goal and keep our mission on track in 2026?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251214_1_mm.16eEtg&refcode=em20251214-2940&amount=5&t=4&akid=2940%2E587540%2EmeZfbN)**

Friend, Tennessee’s special election should’ve been a slam dunk. Instead, Republicans _barely_ held the seat, with just a 9-point win in a district President Trump carried by nearly 20. **That’s a wakeup call. And if we don’t listen, we’ll lose.** I went on Fox News and laid out, step-by-step, what we need to do to win in 2026.
