# [District Round‐up 12.14.25](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=http%3A%2F%2Fbethfarnhamforcongress.com%2F2025%2F12%2F14%2Fdistrict-round-up-12-14-25%2F%3Fjetpack_skip_subscription_popup&sr=0&signature=99dc849dc50af3a0322ea2205b3f843b&blog_id=213069660&user=248418217&_&_z=z)
| By **Elizabeth Farnham** on December 14, 2025
---
Dear Neighbor,
Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. Criss-crossing the counties of Adams, Franklin, Fulton, Bedford, Cambria, Blair, Huntingdon, Mifflin, Juniata, Perry, Cumberland, and Somerset gives me great opportunities to meet with voters, hear what is on your hearts and minds, and the chance to voice my fight for Everyday Americans. If you would like to contribute to my campaign, please donate here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beth-farnham-for-congress-1](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=6441db4a2d384ab66fab726e45a456e39fd78aeb53371f0b36e2549c279f6ae5&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5938&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=2418b4ee5baf8628ed180e256f864274&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JldGgtZmFybmhhbS1mb3ItY29uZ3Jlc3MtMQ=&email_id=88220235b748251979d4cc184b9a2093)
"We had come home from church when we heard the news about Pearl Harbor."
I [](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=49362d4ac27b090a5dc62edf385df0eeff45602e9af15a9366dd54195dcf9de7&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5938&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=121ff69c17b53b03b950bd4ab36b9b75&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url&email_id=88220235b748251979d4cc184b9a2093)don't know how long the services ran at my grandmother's church or if she had stayed late, but the news about Pearl Harbor was not made public until around 2:30 in the afternoon EST, 84 years ago today.
Nonetheless, that fateful Sunday spurred the Greatest Generation, including my paternal grandfather, Captain Wesley Yeo Clement, to action.
No longer would America be a passive observer during World War II, she would supply millions of troops who, along with trusted Allies, conquered fascism and imperialism in the name of DEMOCRACY.
Earlier this month, however, the Trump administration released its National Security Strategy (NSS) which criticizes US allies in Europe and asserts a terrible ideology of "America First" - the same ideology of American Nazi sympathizers in the America First Committee who had the good sense to disband after the bombing of Pearl Harbor.
Yet, just before this world-changing anniversary, Trump's NSS downplayed the threat of Russia to our most trusted allied European countries and pushed them to align with more Nazi-adjacent "values" if they want to keep the relationship with America they've had for the past 80 years.
"It characterizes the European Union in adversarial terms, claiming the body has undermined 'political liberty' and 'sovereignty.' Particularly worrisome for Europeans is the endorsement of far-right ('patriotic') parties and the stated goal to 'cultivate resistance... within European nations.' This will be perceived by European allies as an unacceptable attempt to meddle in their internal affairs. If the test for a good European ally is the extent to which it aligns with the nationalist conservative values of the Trump administration, as this NSS suggests, this does not bode well for the future of the transatlantic relationship. Not only does this new strategy mark the end of the transatlantic alliance based on liberal values, but also a reorientation towards an alliance of illiberals."
In other words, the Trump administration looks to upend all progress and stability that the United States and Europe have known since the end of World War II. My grandfather, along with his fellow airmen, died occupying Germany so fascism would never rise again there, much less here. This betrayal of the Greatest Generation is so very shocking, many haven't even given voice to it, especially as it comes on the heels of Pete Hegseth directing war crimes at the behest of the Trump administration.
Additionally, Trump's NSS inflated the threat of other countries in the Western hemisphere, castigating migration from those countries as "hostile foreign incursion." In other words, if the Trump administration can fabricate an excuse to engage in war that duped Americans will believe, then he pretends he can have his Truman moment and televise a false brawn that his previous draft-dodging can't undo.
But fabricating war is exactly contrary to the strength and stability of this nation.
America has had 80 years of relative peace because, until now, our neighbors, family, coworkers, and fellow congregants did not fall for the claptrap of white Christian nationalism.
Of course, our own US Representative, multimillionaire John Joyce, goes right along with the Trump administration's perfidy to the sacrifices of the Greatest Generation. He has no compunction that Trump will ruin our relationships with real allies and render America, and European democracies, weak to our adversaries. That slobbering sycophant is simply waiting for favor from Trump, not our approval as our representative.
Please vote him out of Congress on November 3rd, and please vote for me, Beth Farnham, to represent our 13th Congressional District because I love my country and value not only the diverse people within, but our relationships with trusted allies that our ancestors built nearly a century ago.
May the sacrifices of the Greatest Generation not have been in vain.
May my fellow Americans always [#ChooseDemocracy](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=223b9a07afc608b86e7a6fcf21e2a16f657b9f2a9a67ca74e5de66d3dcbd33c3&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5938&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=27ed089792887f6c448c1d2d3672c151&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=88220235b748251979d4cc184b9a2093)
Feel free to take this poll on what kind of German you would have been in 1938 and view the results.
[](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=49362d4ac27b090a5dc62edf385df0eeff45602e9af15a9366dd54195dcf9de7&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5938&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=121ff69c17b53b03b950bd4ab36b9b75&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url&email_id=88220235b748251979d4cc184b9a2093)
[Take Our Poll](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=98508d26c415f612a3d6e43b72e9c42c75b26cb459b9646a668ec2dd598f5e2c&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5938&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=fea61178fad5cc86b1fc788d95a58cf6&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9wb2xsLmZtLzE2Mzc5MTAz&email_id=88220235b748251979d4cc184b9a2093)
The much-touted Farm Bridge Assistance Program was released this past week, but it wouldn't be necessary if the Trump administration hadn't wreaked havoc with our agricultural workers and trade partners. Now farmers can have some government handouts instead of earning profits like they did under sane Democratic leadership.
While we try to understand yesterday's senseless tragedy at Brown University, let us not forget that this is not an isolated incident.
In fact, in the last 72 hours in AMERICA, 52 victims and 16 suspects died of gun violence, while an additional 119 victims and 12 suspects were injured by gun violence. [Gun Violence Archive - Last 72 hours](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=d726b0e65a89dbad3199fff43a22dc64fb9950ea83f1f407e4d96b917bf81aee&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5938&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=7be3c2e0e022fba191ef59c95b4c0d3b&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=88220235b748251979d4cc184b9a2093)
Out of countries considered "high income," the United States' gun homicide rate is TWENTY-SIX TIMES that of those similar countries. [The US Gun Homicide Rate is 26 times that of High-income Countries](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=844e9cf92f0fb1aeb5c68e61db42fec89b40c2869b35eecab9345cb00a6f3fe4&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5938&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=7e95c87d247e426a1817ec943ca7d9e0&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=88220235b748251979d4cc184b9a2093)
Gun violence is so prevalent in America, it is the leading cause of death for US children. [Firearms Remain Leading Cause of Death for Children and Teens](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=4fab538ede5c84fec31a99cb0d1dba7deef0155dff9185eff889be1193a2a8e1&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5938&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=e5ed7d69655b30e04de550e64d199e8a&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=88220235b748251979d4cc184b9a2093)
In those other countries, what has made the difference?
Sensible gun ownership known as Gun Safety.
Please vote for me, Beth Farnham, on November 3rd, 2026, so that I can advance Gun Safety in the United States of America and reduce gun violence rates.
Together, we [#ChooseDemocracy](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=5946e3e8d3028680c866f8ad689cf15ddd5b0812963407eb8c3f4bb5f2fc3069&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5938&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=a1da63bc76aa701da0b2aafd7414a78c&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=88220235b748251979d4cc184b9a2093) and the safety of our living, breathing children!If you’re like me, you love this country as much as I do and work to make a positive difference. In the midst of this Constitutional Crisis, please consider reaching out to your local Democratic committees or Democratic candidates so that we can strengthen our Democracy instead of letting it slide into fascism.
We don’t just #ChooseDemocracy, we choose Pennsylvania, we choose The United States of America, we choose Humanity and I am deeply glad to work along side you.
Sincerely,
Beth

body:
We’ve been feeling the energy from all over Wisconsin
| [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-dec25.SSbw4W&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_121425_B1_MMFR&t=2&akid=5713%2E196590%2EwR_Etx) Hi friend, this is Darby, Mandela’s Campaign Manager! I hope your Sunday is going well — I’ll keep this short. We announced Mandela’s campaign for governor and we’ve been feeling the energy from all over the state – and honestly, all over the country. **[If you want to help power our campaign into 2026, please chip in.](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-dec25.SSbw4W&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_121425_B1_MMFR&t=3&akid=5713%2E196590%2EwR_Etx)** Here’s the thing: in just two weeks, our end of year deadline is coming up. That means all eyes are going to be on how much we’ve raised and whether we have the momentum to keep up the pace. This is going to be one of the most closely watched elections in the country. What happens next November is the difference between a governor who is willing to stand up to Trump’s destructive policies, expand Badgercare, and fight to drive down the cost of living... and one who will take us backwards and cater to billionaire special interests. **[With your grassroots support, we’ll be able to sprint into the new year and deliver our bold vision all across Wisconsin — can you contribute today?](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-dec25.SSbw4W&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_121425_B1_MMFR&t=4&akid=5713%2E196590%2EwR_Etx)** _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now._ | | | [DONATE $15 »](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/6574?amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_121425_B1_MMFR&t=5&akid=5713%2E196590%2EwR_Etx)

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. Dear Friend,
A letter is just so much more personal, don’t you think so?
It’s very rare that I get to deliver good news myself – I am pretty busy these days – but this was something I had to take the time and do personally.
Let me be the very first to congratulate you on earning an invitation to the Trump Platinum Club – you’ve made it into the top 1% of supporters!
You are a cherished member of the America First movement, and I couldn’t imagine facing the challenges of the next three years without you by my side.
Please accept this invitation at your earliest convenience and let’s GET TO WORK!
[ACCEPT TRUMP’S OFFER](https://link.win.donaldjtrump._g/s1ife8cab18)
**[As soon as you accept your invitiation, my team will ship you a special MAGA Christmas gift from me Trump to your front doorstep.>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump._g/s4k89b44068)**
Sincerely,
Donald J. Trump
45th and 47th President of the United States of America

subject: Peter, not to be too blunt, but I'm counting on you.
body:
That's why I need you more than ever.

| | | | [](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._RGadIAl0ikIFsw0tw)Peter, not to be too blunt, but I'm counting on you.
As a top supporter, you know I'm a fighter. I stood by President Trump when those we thought were patriots turned their backs on him. Yet, I refused to back down, and the Left will never forgive me for it.
But you've been with me every step of the way, patriot. Your support has been my shield against the RINOS and the radical Left. Now, they're coming at me with everything they've got with double the donors and double the dark money.
To be honest, tonight's critical fundraising goal is in jeopardy. I'm not one to get worried, but the numbers aren't looking good. That's why I need you more than ever, Peter. You're my lifeline.
If we don't meet our goal, we risk being forced to abandon our plans for 2026. I refuse to let the woke liberals win. We can't afford to lose a single battle in this war.
[Can I count on you to rush a donation before midnight? You're my salvation, Peter. I need you now.](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.) | [ DONATE ASAP ](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)

name: Gov. Ron DeSantis
subject: This is a wakeup call.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Restore Our Nation (RON PAC)
body:
Tennessee’s special election should’ve been a slam dunk. | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/_M2KsIaf5eD7UFDZAMti23eFubqjqxWbigubg3B1A0ORvsVvSNOGenZArGtmixUBPDweUc-EpJK1Zw115o10wGnfk1I9wxtpsME2b97w8vlDXr4Jzl55ZIV5E_fF9glX143Se1frFRiEkK9iW5faBGngs08ZoZ53aL4DI8htpsrIGKYgodyDvFcV/698XRb5VPiDvhgcoEX3cFP1VnalBC7F6/15)_
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/rvneft5wi43bszyThvQ3lnQqWgIr0c6CcrsFTjRyvkso4izNAQfvjQLYDkXBamND2rcVVA3irZDIoiPlRCeEEJCaABte0mA-W2ch7HfkT9bU-UYchYeRQJq7dxyaa1q8xiiqkLJIh5W8MdST9VLwahLvpNG-AXOgVK449VVr6wa4_ggsaAaVKTK4k06cx4T2g0500tV0HEw3gqjyuo6T0QxbZ7U9RHIbl4pmVlgT5m4Tj_xypws4WNmWVPfxq3cOWyx7Pgb0jqo66oe9rdp7pIJQucLYo2J_jVoVfOjWC4Xbqf8VoS8u4oF1IPzhauCcvmsecpOSYoiCardG8MGrCvxGQWKX9wZp6JiJkzASlla_z-j0SqUpEURuuHfrBbt_fE3EDbj34ONU-Y4Ya3mi-yb0OuUo2bGHgTJEEyGC3b30jylevfPSOi1CIZWdfstG3YyhXl_m5PwYYzDDUCwMb2of_mD07429a4AIbt7iMgaWyeLgrEwaGHBWA63423TR7NGwhOmJkKS3p9d5SP7UeaOv1ghW1-_pRNcBYrow185sk9rSs0Pcl-gHVmXHddugFkgOGy-S4D_XNPUXWuG-S_8WvrA1bYxborsFA4vDiI42F76bYnNPuF38OdaAiJfsydzFoUK0zRbyMYbNyh4K46H9wKo0floSYkPvYBiCObQyrX4Mjg/6fj22_ug32HqZVcjTcmvsGyoyuPJhrRi/15)
Peter, Tennessee's special election should've been a slam dunk. Instead, Republicans _barely_ held the seat, with just a 9-point win in a district President Trump carried by nearly 20. **That 's a wakeup call. And if we don't listen, we'll lose.** I went on Fox News and laid out, step-by-step, what we need to do to win in 2026.

Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
You are invited to join our one-click issue response poll.
For data integrity purposes, please do not complete this survey if your email address is not dpwillis67@gmail.com .
Everyday Americans are still feeling crunched by rising prices and increased tariffs yet corporate profits and CEO pay are again reaching higher levels. These companies continue to pass their costs down to consumers and decrease the size of items they are selling, while rising inflation and the Trump tariffs are gouging consumers.
We want to hear from voters in your area to get their feelings on the topic. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Should Congress act to protect consumers as corporate profits, CEO compensation, and tariff costs continue to soar?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=121425_1&amount=20]

name: Tony Johnson
subject: The fight against Antifa just got real
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
* * *

| | | | [](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/06d8927739664d2bb0bf441fa25f0bc3-86fc6b4f398844e38422bc6b15bb33f0/63)
---
| |

---
|

---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,

Enough is enough. I’m glad to see the Trump administration is taking action to combat the rising tide of left-wing violence in America.

After years of witnessing Antifa members incite and commit violence against innocent people, attack law enforcement officials, and torch federal and private property, President Trump officially designated Antifa as a domestic terrorist organization.

This is a move The Heritage Foundation’s scholars have promoted since 2019. It will prioritize attention and federal resources on Antifa and provide tools for stopping the funding that allows Antifa to operate.

Antifa is not just “a set of ideas.” It is an organization with a logo, trained activists, funding, and uses pre-made signs and pre-gathered vehicles, gear, and projectiles.

This is a great first step. But there is even more President Trump can do to protect Americans from leftist violence.

The Heritage Foundation is urging the FBI to designate Transgender Ideology-Inspired Violent Extremism (TIVE) as domestic terrorism, following a string of attacks by trans or trans-supporting criminals.

Especially in the aftermath of the Charlie Kirk assassination, this action is long overdue.

If you want to help erase the threat of Antifa, please consider activating your Heritage Foundation membership today.

Your tax-deductible gift will help create and promote public policies that will help defeat the threat of violence from Antifa and transgender extremism.

**It just takes a moment. Click the secure link below to activate your membership today:**

[**https://secured.heritage.org/activate-2/**](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/06d8927739664d2bb0bf441fa25f0bc3-86fc6b4f398844e38422bc6b15bb33f0/63)

Thank you for your dedication to protecting our country.

Best,

Tony Johnson
Director of Membership

The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002

---

---

name: Jacob Davis | FIU
subject: Where AI Meets Spatial Computing—And You Can Still Get In Early ∕ Sunday, December 14, 2025
body:
There’s a quiet revolution happening in how we interact with digital tools—and it’s happening at the intersection of AI and spatial computing. | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://links.research.firstinvestmentupdates.com/u/click?_t=6c5e8d0087884bb7b7cd2e3abb0e6b5f&_m=f3883f603ef642d09e4173515ffdc855&_e=KHp-0IUzEVBm6CTsEujMCTZi9rOc1M8oHDpY_zewpECod-1NhuMzCM0RCpbHpW4eBlVI9fFeW0ya8RL0_IuyZQNp60ExioxRVCa2_LgTCJMIQ9As4GWGShRMbo6lRJoG0pseOaiVxhTQz208UuGLWHzX9hGIYGhpn1vk2uQGLTV-lix0HbPhAyMrL5bEZy_-XxQTmVtRXdl9MhqgR9BVZPEZhXnHLtJp0fj-hXu2QRjO1p_DG--9hm4WVEOqChBS3ygbV6T1sYjf-G5nYqslZO44UC2vWMK06jsmKLOsgJozKxBKWPWkesX8s7yoIhwjuDqLRSMjT7GuY0calVNs9Q%3D%3D "First Investment Update")
| | | | |
---
There’s a quiet revolution happening in how we interact with digital tools—and it’s happening at the intersection of **AI and spatial computing**.

For years, software innovation focused on what you could do _on_ a screen. Now, the breakthrough is happening _around_ the screen.

Immersed is one of the rare companies operating at this new frontier—combining immersive VR environments with AI-driven workflows to build a more intelligent, intuitive way to work.

Their platform allows users to create virtual offices—complete with five digital monitors, real-time collaboration, and distraction-free environments. But what’s really exciting? They're actively integrating AI agents to enhance everything from task automation to real-time brainstorming.

It’s the workspace reimagined—not just in 3D, but in intelligence.

And right now, investors have the chance to get in early. Even better: **invest by December 18 and you could receive an 8% discount on shares through Immersed’s Reg CF offering**.

Here’s why this convergence matters:

✅ **Spatial computing is the next major interface**
Apple, Meta, and Microsoft are pouring billions into headsets and spatial UI. Immersed already operates across all major devices—Vision Pro, Quest, Pico, and desktop—positioning them as the go-to workspace app of the next computing era.

✅ **AI is becoming your virtual coworker**
Immersed isn’t just about visuals—it’s about intelligence. Their AI agents are being designed to help you summarize meetings, code faster, prioritize tasks, and think more clearly inside the virtual space.

✅ **It’s early—but already working**
Thousands of developers and remote teams are using Immersed daily to create, build, and work—now with AI features layered on top. That makes it both futuristic and immediately functional.

Think of it this way: If Zoom was the meeting layer of the pandemic era, Immersed is positioning itself to be the productivity layer of the spatial+AI era.

The platform is built. Adoption is growing. And for the moment, the opportunity to become a shareholder is still open—**with an 8% discount on shares available until December 18.**

Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

clean_body: There’s a quiet revolution happening in how we interact with digital tools—and it’s happening at the intersection of AI and spatial computing. | | | | | | "First Investment Update" | | | | | There’s a quiet revolution happening in how we interact with digital tools—and it’s happening at the intersection of AI and spatial computing. For years, software innovation focused on what you could do on a screen. Now, the breakthrough is happening around the screen. Immersed is one of the rare companies operating at this new frontier—combining immersive VR environments with AI-driven workflows to build a more intelligent, intuitive way to work. Their platform allows users to create virtual offices—complete with five digital monitors, real-time collaboration, and distraction-free environments. But what’s really exciting? They're actively integrating AI agents to enhance everything from task automation to real-time brainstorming. It’s the workspace reimagined—not just in 3D, but in intelligence. And right now, investors have the chance to get in early. Even better: invest by December 18 and you could receive an 8% discount on shares through Immersed’s Reg CF offering. Here’s why this convergence matters: ✅ Spatial computing is the next major interface Apple, Meta, and Microsoft are pouring billions into headsets and spatial UI. Immersed already operates across all major devices—Vision Pro, Quest, Pico, and desktop—positioning them as the go-to workspace app of the next computing era. ✅ AI is becoming your virtual coworker Immersed isn’t just about visuals—it’s about intelligence. Their AI agents are being designed to help you summarize meetings, code faster, prioritize tasks, and think more clearly inside the virtual space. ✅ It’s early—but already working Thousands of developers and remote teams are using Immersed daily to create, build, and work—now with AI features layered on top. subject: James vs. 20 Undecided Texas voters

body:

Peter —
You know James is willing to go everywhere and talk to anyone. It’s how he’s ended up on Joe Rogan’s show and Fox News.
We have to be willing to take risks and go into spaces that too many politicians ignore. Even if it’s risky. Even if it makes us uncomfortable.
That’s why James agreed to do an episode of Surrounded on the Jubilee YouTube channel. An unfiltered conversation between James and 20 undecided voters.
[](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/1088?refcode=em251214-1-ak&t=1&akid=317%2E1347274%2E3x140V)
It’s a good look at exactly why James is the best candidate to take back Texas. His message and approach can bring people together from across the political spectrum.
But don’t just take our word for it. [**Watch it here.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/1088?refcode=em251214-1-ak&t=2&akid=317%2E1347274%2E3x140V)**
\- Team Talarico

name: JD Vance
subject: I consider Peter one of my closest advisors

body:
| I’m about to ask you to make a donation to my campaign.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=5152%2E35263%2EJvmL-a)
Team — I’m about to ask you to make a donation to my campaign. I hope you'll give me a chance to explain why this request is so important, especially today. Every single day that I am in the U.S. Senate, you can find me fighting for working families and against the Trump administration's radical agenda, whether it’s fighting to keep _Affordable Care Act_ subsidies or to hold Trump and his administration accountable. I can do that better when I’ve got a strong wall of support behind me. Tomorrow night — the mid-December mark — is an important benchmark for us to meet our monthly and end-of-quarter fundraising goals. At the end of December, when we report our fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission, we need to present a strong report to show Republicans just how unpopular their agenda is, and to show that people across the country are ready to flip the Senate blue in 2026. ****[So, that’s why I’m asking: Will you make a contribution of any amount to help us stay on track?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-dec25.Xhg_L0&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20251214_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=5152%2E35263%2EJvmL-a)**** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=stb-em-dec25.-J9ZHh&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20251214_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=5152%2E35263%2EJvmL-a)

name: Christina (personal)
subject: We deserve better
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Peter –

Tonight is our mid-month fundraising deadline for December, and I wanted to reach out once more **[to ask if you could make a donation toward our goal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121277080/588929650/-1610961223?refcode=em25_251214_mm3_fndd_gq_act___cbpers_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_251214_mm3_fndd_gq_act___cbpers_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=f1b6f713-40d9-f011-8196-000d3a1d5215&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWI2ZjcxMy00MGQ5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni0wMDBkM2ExZDUyMTUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TNBkG6e1ic1icEuzWT3jPS7-WDL--j4YCBgs6yK8OaM=)**. But I also want to stress why this campaign is so important to me.

I love Iowa for the opportunities it gave my daughter to thrive. I found a home in our district, a sense of purpose in my job as a professor, and a sense of community in the neighbors and friends who have become like family to me. But every day, the things we hold dear and love most about our district are being threatened by Mariannette Miller-Meeks' leadership.

We deserve better than a big-pharma-funded puppet who voted to kick 100,000 Iowans off their insurance, and for premiums to skyrocket for those who are still lucky to have coverage.

We deserve better than an anti-abortion extremist ready to vote away our reproductive freedoms.

We deserve better than a politician who prioritizes tax breaks for her wealthy donors over the livelihoods of those she was elected to serve.

And we deserve better than someone who continues to support reckless tariffs, falls in line with party bosses, and lets critical legislation stall as working families suffer.

**Peter, Iowa deserves better than Mariannette Miller-Meeks.** I will always work for you and your families in Congress, but I need your help to get there next November.

With our critical mid-month deadline hitting at midnight, can I count on you to rush in $10 or more to work toward a better future for Iowa? You can chip in toward my campaign using this link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cb-q4-2025?refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121277081/588929651/-1610961223?refcode=em25_251214_mm3_fndd_gq_act___cbpers_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_251214_mm3_fndd_gq_act___cbpers_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=f1b6f713-40d9-f011-8196-000d3a1d5215&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWI2ZjcxMy00MGQ5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni0wMDBkM2ExZDUyMTUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TNBkG6e1ic1icEuzWT3jPS7-WDL--j4YCBgs6yK8OaM=)**

I'm so grateful for your support,

Christina |

clean_body: | Peter – Tonight is our mid-month fundraising deadline for December, and I wanted to reach out once more =. But I also want to stress why this campaign is so important to me. I love Iowa for the opportunities it gave my daughter to thrive. I found a home in our district, a sense of purpose in my job as a professor, and a sense of community in the neighbors and friends who have become like family to me. But every day, the things we hold dear and love most about our district are being threatened by Mariannette Miller-Meeks' leadership. We deserve better than a big-pharma-funded puppet who voted to kick 100,000 Iowans off their insurance, and for premiums to skyrocket for those who are still lucky to have coverage. We deserve better than an anti-abortion extremist ready to vote away our reproductive freedoms. We deserve better than a politician who prioritizes tax breaks for her wealthy donors over the livelihoods of those she was elected to serve. And we deserve better than someone who continues to support reckless tariffs, falls in line with party bosses, and lets critical legislation stall as working families suffer. Peter, Iowa deserves better than Mariannette Miller-Meeks. I will always work for you and your families in Congress, but I need your help to get there next November. With our critical mid-month deadline hitting at midnight, can I count on you to rush in $10 or more to work toward a better future for Iowa? You can chip in toward my campaign using this link: = I'm so grateful for your support, Christina | | PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 722 Iowa City, IA 52244 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Paul Begala
subject: Iowa is at the heart of the 2026 cycle
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
I’ve been in the game a long time, so I’ve got a sense which races are going to be close and which candidates are worth getting behind.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98535?refcode=em20251214-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9823%2E614464%2EQB-UnR)
Peter, it’s political strategist Paul Begala.
I’ve been in the game a long time, so I’ve got a sense which races are going to be close and which candidates are worth getting behind.
I’m also very familiar with the importance of Iowa, which is why I know that Rob Sand has what it takes to win the governor’s race, for a number of reasons:
> _It’s already close. Like, really close. In fact, Sabato’s Crystal Ball recently moved it from “Likely R” to “Lean R.”_
> _The partisan insiders who’ve been at the wheel for years are historically unpopular. Before announcing she’s not running for re-election, Kim Reynolds was among the least popular governors in the country._
> _Rob Sand is a uniquely perfect candidate for this race, and his campaign gives Democrats a shot to win a race that would otherwise be out of reach._
**We’d be foolish to sleep on Iowa, and we’ve got an opportunity to make massive inroads in a tough state, but only if we support Rob Sand.[Will you please split a donation between his campaign to be Iowa’s next governor and Heartland Patriots?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98535?refcode=em20251214-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9823%2E614464%2EQB-UnR)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98535?refcode=em20251214-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9823%2E614464%2EQB-UnR)**
Rob Sand gives us a chance to move Iowa forward and pry control away from the partisan insiders and special interests that he’s gone after during his time as State Auditor.
_Some of those same insiders are even running against Rob, too._
Winning in a state like Iowa won’t be easy. It’s going to require broad, far-ranging outreach, tough conversations with folks who might not always agree with us, and forging connections based on Iowa and the needs of the community.
But the key ingredient to winning a tough race in a challenging environment is grassroots support and enthusiasm. **_And that’s Rob’s not-so-secret weapon._**
**I’m all-in on helping elect Rob as Iowa’s next governor, but he’s going to need more than just my help — _he needs yours, too, Peter._ [Can he count on you to split a $25 donation to boost his campaign and help elect a governor who will move Iowa forward?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98535?refcode=em20251214-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9823%2E614464%2EQB-UnR)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Rob Sand and Heartland Patriots will process instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98536?refcode=em20251214-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=9823%2E614464%2EQB-UnR) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98536?refcode=em20251214-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=9823%2E614464%2EQB-UnR) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98536?refcode=em20251214-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=9823%2E614464%2EQB-UnR) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98536?refcode=em20251214-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=9823%2E614464%2EQB-UnR) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98536?refcode=em20251214-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=9823%2E614464%2EQB-UnR) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98536?refcode=em20251214-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=9823%2E614464%2EQB-UnR) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98535?refcode=emem20251214-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=9823%2E614464%2EQB-UnR)

subject: Why we can't afford to fall short

body:
| | | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/134?t=1&akid=6217%2E400544%2EePsGnn)
---
Hi friend, it’s Dylan, Deb’s campaign manager.

I'm reaching out personally because our mid-month deadline is just 24 hours away — **and right now, we're dangerously short of our $30,000 goal.** **[Please, can I count on you to rush a $5 donation to help us close the gap?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1848?t=2&akid=6217%2E400544%2EePsGnn)**
| | [Pitch in $5 >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1848?t=3&akid=6217%2E400544%2EePsGnn)
---
New Mexico’s governorship has a history of flipping parties every eight years — and with the Democratic Party's winning margin growing smaller every election, _all eyes are on New Mexico_.

The GOP is going to do whatever it takes to win this race. They're already pouring money into attacks, trying to flip our state red and to top it all off: **A self-funded millionaire GOP opponent JUST jumped into this race.**
Deb is a proven champion for working people, and she's ready to lead our state toward progress. **But she can't do it alone.**
**That's why I'm personally asking:[Will you pitch in $5 right now to help us close the gap on our $30,000 mid-month goal and help Deb become the next governor of New Mexico?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1848?t=4&akid=6217%2E400544%2EePsGnn)**
| | [Pitch in $5 >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1848?t=5&akid=6217%2E400544%2EePsGnn)
---
Thank you,

Dylan McArthur
Campaign Manager

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Lindell for Governor
body:
Please Buy and Donate to help us share Mike's message of Hope.

| | | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
|
---
| |

# Mike Lindell Book
What are the Odds?
Soft Cover - Signed by Mike

---
| |
**You will receive an autographed copy, and the rest of the monies will be used to send a copy of the book to Minnesota voters so they can learn about Mike and have a sense of Hope in the upcoming elections. If you choose not to receive an autographed copy, all of the proceeds will be used to educate voters in Minnesota.
**Far more than a “business memoir,” _What Are the Odds?_ is a raw, authentic account by a man many thought would never rise above his serial, addiction-fueled failures. Mike’s gripping narrative transports readers from his small-town tavern with its colorful cast of “Regulars” to Mexico and a drug deal gone awry. From Las Vegas casinos, where Mike won and lost fortunes as a professional gambler, to a jail-cell beat down. From failed rehabs to his 20-year marriage, an ideal union decimated by addiction. And finally, to the redemption of the most shameful moment of his life.
_What Are the Odds?_ will not only speak to entrepreneurs and those struggling with addiction, but also to anyone looking for a message of hope.
---
| [SHOP NOW](https://mikelindellgov.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=806e569058653e0bbc8abce9f&id=fcc12dd9fc&e=4483e5fdfa)

name: Team Fetterman
subject: 3 numbers you need to see right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
[ https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51612?t=1001&akid=10478%2E434096%2EcHfCWV ]John Fetterman

Hi, Derek, Team Fetterman here, with three numbers you need to see right now.

24,000,000.

That's the number of people who buy insurance through Obamacare.

26%.

That's the expected hike in premiums for these folks because Republicans just BLOCKED the renewal of the Obamacare tax credits that make insurance more affordable.

18.

That's the number of Republican Senators up for reelection next year who just voted to lock in sky-high premiums for Americans all across this country.

Every time it’s come up for a vote, John's voted yes to extend the subsidies.

We need folks in the Senate who are going to look out for working folks, not the insurance CEOs and the ultrawealthy trying to profit off our neighbors who are just trying to get in to see their doctor or fill their prescription.

So we're doing everything we can to sound the alarm and get ready to kick them out of office, and that starts by hitting our final mid-month deadline of the year.

We're hustling to raise $30,000 by tomorrow at midnight to start off the election year strong. Will you pitch in $5, or whatever you can, right now to help us hit this goal and make Republicans PAY for sending health care through the roof?

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52411?t=1002&akid=10478%2E434096%2EcHfCWV

Thanks for stepping up,

Team Fetterman 💛

--------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here: null

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: I wanted to inform you of some news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Peter - I wanted to inform you sooner rather than later.
I've come to truly appreciate your consistent record.
With everything you've given to our movement, there was no question in my mind that I needed to send you this message ASAP.
I'd hate to see this opportunity pass you by.
That's why as soon as the House GOP Platinum committee flagged your profile, I knew I had to extend both a message of gratitude and of urgency!

1. **THANK YOU! I am so proud of everything we have accomplished and how far you 've come in your support for the House GOP, Peter. We would not be able to deliver on our America First agenda without you!**
2. **You 're now eligible for PLATINUM STATUS! Will you please accept this status and add this critical accomplishment to your GOP legacy?**

I'm not at all worried about your continued commitment. The last thing I would ever do is question your loyalty. But I'd hate for you to miss out on your chance to upgrade today with this limited time offer!

That's why as soon as the House GOP Platinum committee flagged your profile, I knew I had to extend both a message of gratitude and of urgency! 1. THANK YOU! I am so proud of everything we have accomplished and how far you 've come in your support for the House GOP, Peter. We would not be able to deliver on our America First agenda without you! 2. You 're now eligible for PLATINUM STATUS! Will you please accept this status and add this critical accomplishment to your GOP legacy? I'm not at all worried about your continued commitment. The last thing I would ever do is question your loyalty. But I'd hate for you to miss out on your chance to upgrade today with this limited time offer! name: Jon Ossoff for U.S. Senate
subject: It’s Sunday, December 14 and Jon Ossoff needs our help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

**An update for Peter on Georgia’s Senate race:**
**It’s Sunday, December 14 and Jon Ossoff needs our help. Please, don’t skip this quick but important request.**
_Today, we’re asking you to give $5 to reelect Jon Ossoff._ We are asking today because we just launched our mid-month fundraising drive, and we have to start strong if we’re going to have any shot at hitting our goals.
Many people give because they want to stop a MAGA takeover in Georgia. Others, because they see the good work Jon is doing in the Senate, and want to see that work continue. [**If you feel the same, please add your $5 today.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251214-2-full-b&t=1&akid=1272%2E5691347%2EC1U42D) _Thank you._

**Please donate any amount that feels right to you.** Our average online donation is about $30 so far in December. Many first-time donors give just $5 or $10. The most important thing isn’t the amount of the donation, it’s that you’re chipping in to support Jon during our fundraising drive. _Thank you again._**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

name: Tim Walz
subject: Really? Mike Lindell?
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
Mike Lindell is Donald Trump’s pick for Governor of Minnesota.
| **Mike Lindell is running for Governor of Minnesota.** The MyPillow CEO and snake oil salesman is bringing his election-denying, con-manning, Trump-sycophantic self to this governor’s race. Peter, we’ve seen what happens when we elect a crook to the highest office in America. We can’t let it happen in Minnesota. While I’m not going around the state selling a — let’s be honest — below average pillow, I am selling the progress that has been made in my time as governor — like paid family and medical leave, free school lunches for our students, and tax breaks for working families. **I want to be clear: Mike Lindell is Donald Trump’s pick for Governor of Minnesota. He’s got the backing of his MAGA buddies, and will have deep pockets in this run.** **[Will you split a donation between my campaign and Roy Cooper today to make sure we’re able to fight back against Mike Lindell?](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2686?t=2&akid=164%2E124072%2Ekp7_CX)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Tim Walz and Roy Cooper:_ | [SPLIT $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2687?t=3&akid=164%2E124072%2Ekp7_CX)

The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.

The MyPillow CEO and snake oil salesman is bringing his election-denying, con-manning, Trump-sycophantic self to this governor’s race. Peter, we’ve seen what happens when we elect a crook to the highest office in America. We can’t let it happen in Minnesota. I want to be clear: Mike Lindell is Donald Trump’s pick for Governor of Minnesota. He’s got the backing of his MAGA buddies, and will have deep pockets in this run. Republicans are bracing for losses because they know Trump’s tariffs are driving up costs and hitting Americans’ wallets.
